 "skinGroupSortIndex": -10,
 "content": "After receiving Rhodes Island's permission, a certain dangerous person received a lot of dangerous weapons.\\nShe happily tinkered with these weapons to make the best use of them whenever needed.  "dialog": null,
 "usage": null,
 "description": null,

 "content": "Test Collection Series/Snowstorm Invitation. An outfit tailor-made by Karlan Trade for their affiliated business negotiators. First impressions are of the utmost importance in trade talks. Steward knows this well, and has never failed to live up to expectations.",
 "dialog": "Test Collection Series/Snowstorm Invitation. An outfit tailor-made by Karlan Trade for their affiliated business negotiators. First impressions are of the utmost importance in trade talks. Steward knows this well, and has never failed to live up to expectations.",

 "content": "Test Collection Series/Midnight Delivery. As part of our cooperation agreement, Rhodes Island ordered this operator uniform for Exusiai. She can be seen wearing it, from time to time, during operations in Lungmen.",
 "dialog": "Test Collection Series/Midnight Delivery. As part of our cooperation agreement, Rhodes Island ordered this operator uniform for Exusiai. She can be seen wearing it, from time to time, during operations in Lungmen.",
 "usage": "One of Exusiai's casual outfits.",
 "description": "The night before the Doctor's team arrives at Lungmen, Exusiai and Texas have gathered all the intel needed. Before going back to rest, however, Texas forced her to put on this partner-provided uniform and rehearsed multiple courses of action.",

 "skinGroupName": "Test Collection/X",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 11,
 "content": "Test Collection Series/There They Be. Saga's attire when she left P'o-shan Village, with Biteys for pockets and straw sandals. What is in the scrolls cannot be removed, but after so much time spent with oneselves, what was drawn in ink is now etched in the heart.",
 "dialog": "Test Collection Series/There They Be. Saga's attire when she left P'o-shan Village, with Biteys for pockets and straw sandals. What is in the scrolls cannot be removed, but after so much time spent with oneselves, what was drawn in ink is now etched in the heart.",
 "usage": "One of Saga's casual outfits.",
 "description": "'This side or the other, real or ethereal. If before thou stands a bandit or a village girl, then I am simply yet another dream, yet unawakened.'",

 "content": "Test Collection Series/Bunch of Sunlight. Outfit specially designed for going out. It uses the operator's main color as basic tone and matches it with a different-colored jacket for a vivid contrast.",
 "dialog": "Test Collection Series/Bunch of Sunlight. Outfit specially designed for going out. It uses the operator's main color as basic tone and matches it with a different-colored jacket for a vivid contrast.",
 "usage": "One of Lava's casual outfits.",
 "description": "May you always look toward the bright future as these flowers do.",
 "obtainApproach": "Obtain from Special Pack",
 "sortId": 13,
 "displayTagId": "Official Artworks",
 "getTime": 1728579600,
 "onYear": 4,

 "skinGroupId": "2024#sale",
 "skinGroupName": "Test Collection/XI",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 12,
 "content": "Test Collection Series/After Storm. Frost inevitably gives way to a clear day. Ch'en Hui-chieh patrols the city in her first L.G.D. uniform, re-inspecting the metropolis both familiar and foreign to her.",
 "dialog": "Test Collection Series/After Storm. Frost inevitably gives way to a clear day. Ch'en Hui-chieh patrols the city in her first L.G.D. uniform, re-inspecting the metropolis both familiar and foreign to her.",
 "usage": "One of Ch'en's work outfits.",
 "description": "The warm sun pierces through the clouds, and what were once the vestiges of frost have now, with the advent of spring, become the first sign of the nurturing land nourishing its children.",
 "obtainApproach": "Obtain from Special Pack",
 "sortId": 14,
 "displayTagId": "Obtain from Special Pack",

 "skinGroupSortIndex": 13,
 "content": "Test Collection Series/Phase Face. Clothes that show off both Tin Man's classical and surrealist sides. The final design was put together using Furnace illusions. A sense of strangeness blurs the line between illusion and reality.",
 "dialog": "Test Collection Series/Phase Face. Clothes that show off both Tin Man's classical and surrealist sides. The final design was put together using Furnace illusions. A sense of strangeness blurs the line between illusion and reality.",
 "usage": "One of Tin Man's casual outfits.",

 "skinGroupId": "2024#sale#3",
 "skinGroupName": "Test Collection/XIII",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 14,
 "content": "Test Collection Series/Diversity Oneness. A possibility derived from when Virtuosa connected to the Law: emotions link together the hearts of all. The performer who once plucked at their heartstrings is now no more than a voice in the chorus.",
 "dialog": "Test Collection Series/Diversity Oneness. A possibility derived from when Virtuosa connected to the Law: emotions link together the hearts of all. The performer who once plucked at their heartstrings is now no more than a voice in the chorus.",
 "usage": "One of Virtuosa's casual outfits.",
 "description": "She sees a Laterano: open, harmonized, mutualistic. Amidst the unending flow of emotion, people no longer close off their hearts. Mutual achievement, mutual comfort. Each their own self, her included.",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 16,
 "displayTagId": null,
 "getTime": 1745514000,
 "onYear": 5,
 "onPeriod": 6
 }
 },

 "skinGroupName": "Test Collection/XIII",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 14,
 "content": "Test Collection Series/Allmind As One. A possibility derived from when Executor connected to the Law: connected consciousnesses tend towards unity, all to achieve one goal. Exsequi. Exsequi. Exsequi.",
 "dialog": "Test Collection Series/Allmind As One. A possibility derived from when Executor connected to the Law: connected consciousnesses tend towards unity, all to achieve one goal. Exsequi. Exsequi. Exsequi.",
 "usage": "One of Executor the Ex Foedere's casual outfits.",
 "description": "He sees a Laterano: united, efficient, serene. Under absolute rationality, the individual is but a gear in the machine, and he is its core.",

 "skinGroupName": "Test Collection/XIV",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 15,
 "content": "Test Birthday Collection 1101/Solo Around The World. The Ark cradling the cocoon of dreams sailed into the galaxy, dissolving into millions of threads. With love as their needle, the many hands crafted a one-of-a-kind garment for Amiya. The remaining threads, intertwined with wishes, were fashioned into a violin.",
 "dialog": "Test Birthday Collection 1101/Solo Around The World. The Ark cradling the cocoon of dreams sailed into the galaxy, dissolving into millions of threads. With love as their needle, the many hands crafted a one-of-a-kind garment for Amiya. The remaining threads, intertwined with wishes, were fashioned into a violin.",
 "usage": "One of Amiya's birthday outfits.",
 "description": "She draws the bow slowly, gently whispering her wishes. Though not a single note has ever changed, her audience, her stage, and she herself have been constantly evolving. She will not stop playing, until this land and sky hold her music in their memory.",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 18,
 "displayTagId": null,
 "getTime": 1734957000,
 "onYear": 4,
 "onPeriod": 18
 }
 },

 "skinGroupName": "Test Collection/XV",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 16,
 "content": "Test Collection Series/Moonlit Voyage. Themed around the night sky, the moon, and oceanic voyages, the dream-like weave of star and sea feels like going on a fantastical journey, with drifting moon and stars as companions.",
 "dialog": "Test Collection Series/Moonlit Voyage. Themed around the night sky, the moon and oceanic voyages, the dream-like weave of star and sea feels like going on a fantastical journey, with drifting moon and stars as companions.",
 "usage": "One of Kroos's casual outfits.",
 "description": "Kroos falls into a long, long dream. In that dream, she dons star and moon, and sails the ocean blue. She meets a few interesting people, and sees plenty of comedy and tragedy both. Where will her journey take her next? She's eager to find out.",
 "obtainApproach": "Event Reward",
 "sortId": 19,
 "displayTagId": "Event Reward",
 "getTime": 1760443200,
 "onYear": 5,
 "onPeriod": 17
 }

 "skinGroupName": "Test Collection/XV",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 16,
 "content": "Test Collection Series/Supernova. Clothes Wiš'adel wears when stepping into the unknown of space to corral Originium run wild. According to her, since she's here to clean up the trash, she should wear something suitable for the occasion.",
 "dialog": "Test Collection Series/Supernova. Clothes Wiš'adel wears when stepping into the unknown of space to corral Originium run wild. According to her, since she's here to clean up the trash, she should wear something suitable for the occasion.",
 "usage": "One of Wiš'adel's casual outfits.",
 "description": "'We're finally here, Doctor. Is this ship floating out in space supposed to be an old haunt of yours? What, feeling anxious? Well too bad, you don't have a choice. 'Wiš'adel', here to destroy your Originium project now that it's running wild.'",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 20,
 "displayTagId": null,
 "getTime": 1760443200,

 }

 "skinGroupName": "Test Collection/XV",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 16,
 "content": "Test Collection Series/Glory of the Devout. Nun's habit that has been altered, with adjustments for the wearer's racial characteristics. Paired with accessories that reflect one's personal style.",
 "dialog": "Test Collection Series/Glory of the Devout. Nun's habit that has been altered, with adjustments for the wearer's racial characteristics. Paired with accessories that reflect one's personal style.",
 "usage": "One of Archetto's casual outfits.",
 "description": "The clerics of Landen Monastery haven't worn the traditional habit as daily attire in quite a while, but on days that require hymn-singing and pious vows, they take the time to put them on and gather in the chapel, for the sake of a beautiful dream that all have partaken in for ages past.",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 21,
 "displayTagId": null,
 "getTime": 1760443200,
 "onYear": 5,
 "onPeriod": 17
 }
 },

 "skinGroupId": "2025#sale#2",
 "skinGroupName": "Test Collection/XVI",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 17,
 "content": "Test Collection Series/The Remains of Time. An outfit worn by Kal'tsit while in disguise. Countless times, in this manner, she influenced the course of Terra's civilization—ripples in the great river of time, a fleeting mark on her endless journey.",
 "dialog": "Test Collection Series/The Remains of Time. An outfit worn by Kal'tsit while in disguise. Countless times, in this manner, she influenced the course of Terra's civilization—ripples in the great river of time, a fleeting mark on her endless journey.",
 "usage": "One of Kal'tsit's casual outfits.",
 "description": "She walked the mountain called Time, calling into the eternal, empty valley, and found an echo of life. 'Kal'tsit, have you found yourself?'",
 "obtainApproach": "Obtain from Special Pack",

 "usage": "One of Robin's casual outfits.",

 "dialog": "EPOQUE Series New Release/Appreciate Fragrance. Finely-crafted Victorian dress, handmade from the finest materials. An elegant and dignified outfit bound to garner attention anywhere.",

 "dialog": "EPOQUE Series New Release/Plant Crude Drug. Practical outfit worn by Mulberry for both relief and horticultural work, with enough pockets for all her tools. Green trimmings adorn the simple fabric, representing verdant life.",

 "KuroBlood"\

 "designerList": null,
 "skinGroupId": "2024#nian",
 "skinGroupName": "0011 Productions/IX",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 72,
 "content": "0011 Custom Brand \[Magnificence Curation\] Series Collection/Alighting. Magnum opus of a Yumen craftsman, given to a traveler heading on a long journey. In the hope that men and might need no longer be a burden, that he can wander for myriad li with ease.",
 "dialog": "0011 Custom Brand \[Magnificence Curation\] Series Collection/Alighting. Magnum opus of a Yumen craftsman, given to a traveler heading on a long journey. In the hope that men and might need no longer be a burden, that he can wander for myriad li with ease.",
 "usage": "One of Chongyue's casual outfits.",
 "description": "O lush wood, how long have you stood? O fluttering pale plumes, how far have you wandered? The seasons turn, and the white feathers return not. O barren tree, where could they perch?",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 50,
 "displayTagId": null,
 "getTime": 1722427200,
 "onYear": 4,
 "onPeriod": 11
 }
 },

 "三目YYB"\

 "skinGroupId": "2024#nian",
 "skinGroupName": "0011 Productions/IX",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 72,
 "content": "0011 Custom Brand \[Magnificence Curation\] Series Collection/Heavenly Mirage. Recreation of a Lungmen VIP's childhood fantasy. She enters the Xians' abode, dressed in celestial garb, skirts dark as kohl, jade pure as ice, face austere, serene. Transcendent.",
 "dialog": "0011 Custom Brand \[Magnificence Curation\] Series Collection/Heavenly Mirage. Recreation of a Lungmen VIP's childhood fantasy. She enters the Xians' abode, dressed in celestial garb, skirts dark as kohl, jade pure as ice, face austere, serene. Transcendent.",
 "usage": "One of Lin's casual outfits.",
 "description": "My gaze falls upon clearest ice and coldest jade, arrayed hither and tither. The Qionghua blooms of the celestial realm know my heart, and refuse to wither. —Inscribed in Lin Yühsia's study",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 51,
 "displayTagId": null,
 "getTime": 1722427200,
 "onYear": 4,
 "onPeriod": 11
 }
 },

 "skinGroupSortIndex": 72,
 "content": "0011 Custom Brand \[Magnificence Curation\] Series Collection/The Land With Me. Handmade by a Lungmen craftsman, inspired by Yanese landscape paintings. Thanks to weaving and dyeing techniques rarely seen in the modern age, mounts and seas emerge from the nichang's fabric, blurring fantasy and reality.",
 "dialog": "0011 Custom Brand \[Magnificence Curation\] Series Collection/The Land With Me. Handmade by a Lungmen craftsman, inspired by Yanese landscape paintings. Thanks to weaving and dyeing techniques rarely seen in the modern age, mounts and seas emerge from the nichang's fabric, blurring fantasy and reality.",
 "usage": "One of Highmore's casual outfits.",
 "description": "I arrive there as I arrive here when wandering mount and sea. The sun, moons and full blossoms gift their scents to you as they do me.",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 52,

 "skinGroupName": "0011 Productions/IX",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 72,
 "content": "0011 Custom Brand \[Magnificence Curation\] Series Collection/Saturated Within Rain. Handmade by a Lungmen craftsman, matching a scene of beauty and wonder recorded in an ancient tome. Remember to bring a paper umbrella, for within, the drops of ink now fall as gentle rains.",
 "dialog": "0011 Custom Brand \[Magnificence Curation\] Series Collection/Saturated Within Rain. Handmade by a Lungmen craftsman, matching a scene of beauty and wonder recorded in an ancient tome. Remember to bring a paper umbrella, for within, the drops of ink now fall as gentle rains.",
 "usage": "One of Honeyberry's casual outfits.",
 "description": "The gentle showers soak the city's green leaves bold. The rainbow half up the mount shines on village old.",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 53,

 "skinGroupId": "2024#nian#2",
 "skinGroupName": "0011 Productions/X",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 73,
 "content": "0011 New Arrivals/Yearly Present. Purestream dons new clothes and brings a gift for her visit, the trendy multi-layered style unable to hide the bright colors of Yan—the hem's red lining and the pendants on her staff and her waist come together in harmonious ingenuity.",
 "dialog": "0011 New Arrivals/Yearly Present. Purestream dons new clothes and brings a gift for her visit, the trendy multi-layered style unable to hide the bright colors of Yan—the hem's red lining and the pendants on her staff and her waist come together in harmonious ingenuity.",
 "usage": "One of Purestream's casual outfits.",
 "description": "'When the spring chill's coming in, you gotta shout 'Happy New Year, long time no see!''",
 "obtainApproach": "Event Reward",
 "sortId": 54,
 "displayTagId": "Event Reward",
 "getTime": 1723654800,

 "skinGroupName": "0011 Productions/XI",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 74,
 "content": "0011 New Arrivals/Spring Feast. Outfit Shu wore during a feast held by her family. A beauteous purple robe across her shoulders, a silken skirt along her legs. Here, a goddess lies, quietly watching the turning of the seasons.",
 "dialog": "0011 New Arrivals/Spring Feast. Outfit Shu wore during a feast held by her family. A beauteous purple robe across her shoulders, a silken skirt along her legs. Here, a goddess lies, quietly watching the turning of the seasons.",
 "usage": "One of Shu's casual outfits.",
 "description": "She was always the first to arrive. She always tidied everything up in silence. She was always the last to leave.",

 "content": "0011 New Arrivals/Youthful Journey. Outfit Zuo Le wore when using the Tianshi Bureaus' training grounds. Integrated with elements of the Tianshi gown, enabling mobility while highlighting his youthful spirit.",
 "dialog": "0011 New Arrivals/Youthful Journey. Outfit Zuo Le wore when using the Tianshi Bureaus' training grounds. Integrated with elements of the Tianshi gown, enabling mobility while highlighting his youthful spirit.",
 "usage": "One of Zuo Le's casual outfits.",
 "description": "A chivalrous young swordsman has come to the Tianshi Bureaus. It is said he traversed the lands and learned much on his travels, but to hear a story from him, you must first duel him.  "content": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/Temperament. Adroit tailoring and a rich modern sense for color, contrasted with accessories detailed with classical appeal. Spectacles are custom-made as a gift by the brand, for the client.",
 "dialog": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/Temperament. Adroit tailoring and a rich modern sense for color, contrasted with accessories detailed with classical appeal. Spectacles are custom-made as a gift by the brand, for the client.",

 "dialog": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/Justice Maker. Attire of Wild Mane during repairs of 'Justice Knight.' Cozy and breathable, while wear and stain resistant. Detailing and accessories in contrasting colors coordinated to embody that sense of planning.",

 "dialog": "EPOQUE Sub-Brand \[Passe\] Series Selects/Wildness Behind. The clothes Honeyberry envisioned during her studies as she described her own prospects to her sickly mother, their intricacies drawn from her mother's wardrobe.",

 "content": "EPOQUE Sub-Brand \[Passe\] Series Selects/Distant Home's Guide. The plainclothes Quercus once wore on an infiltration mission. Principally serving to conceal her identity, so as to better facilitate combat in city environs.",

 "竜崎いち"\
 \],
 "designerList": null,
 "skinGroupId": "2022#epoque#5",
 "skinGroupName": "EPOQUE/XVIII",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 35,
 "content": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/Ingenious Servant. A bespoke outfit ordered at the Savile Boutique Tailors by Kjera, the finished product of bewildering quality thanks to the fantastic minds of the designers, plus Kjera's own clever touch.",
 "dialog": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/Ingenious Servant. A bespoke outfit ordered at the Savile Boutique Tailors by Kjera, the finished product of bewildering quality thanks to the fantastic minds of the designers, plus Kjera's own clever touch.",
 "usage": "One of Kjera's casual outfits.",
 "description": "If not for Kjera's perusal of some traditional Victorian fairytales prior to ordering, Pramanix might have utterly missed out on the look of furrowed perplexity that flitted across SilverAsh's face. And what of Kjera's thoughts, you say? She's having a great deal of fun.",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 68,
 "displayTagId": null,
 "getTime": 1686675600,
 "onYear": 3,
 "onPeriod": 9
 }
 },

 "skinGroupSortIndex": 36,
 "content": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/A Drip of Orea and Potamous. Designed for the climate of Minos, slim-fitting and easy to move in. The fabric is durable, waterproof, and resistant to the occasional spilled wine. Can be customized with extras to the customer's needs.",
 "dialog": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/A Drip of Orea and Potamous. Designed for the climate of Minos, slim-fitting and easy to move in. The fabric is durable, waterproof, and resistant to the occasional spilled wine. Can be customized with extras to the customer's needs.",
 "usage": "One of Pallas's casual outfits.",
 "description": "The drunken traveler walks her homeland's mountains and rivers. A new epic is poured into the temple that the twelve heroes retook.",

 "skinGroupName": "EPOQUE/XXIII",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 40,
 "content": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/Fantastic Crafts. Astesia and her sister wore this for a machine design competition. Lightweight, durable, and easy to clean, a stylish outfit for a hard-worker.",
 "dialog": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/Fantastic Crafts. Astesia and her sister wore this for a machine design competition. Lightweight, durable, and easy to clean, a stylish outfit for a hard-worker.",
 "usage": "One of Astesia's casual outfits.",
 "description": "While her sister works on the machine for the competition, Astesia quietly goes about procuring materials, managing the schedule, testing... and preparing three meals a day for the two of them.",

 "skinGroupId": "2023#epoque#6",
 "skinGroupName": "EPOQUE/XXIV",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 41,
 "content": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/To Effloresce Whitely. A gown for Victorian nobles woven with fine muslin, fragrant and supple flowers gracing the pure white skirt. A quiet elegance, delicate and sublime.",
 "dialog": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/To Effloresce Whitely. A gown for Victorian nobles woven with fine muslin, fragrant and supple flowers gracing the pure white skirt. A quiet elegance, delicate and sublime.",
 "usage": "One of Horn's casual outfits.",
 "description": "A longsword sheathed in stone with vines wrapped around the hilt. Souls of the departed lost to war should, like this sword, go to a quiet place inlaid with white flowers to forever rest in peace.",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 76,

 }

 \],

 "skinGroupId": "2023#epoque#6",
 "skinGroupName": "EPOQUE/XXIV",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 41,
 "content": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/A Thousand Correspondences. A custom outfit made of fine and lightweight material, tailored based on Heidi's descriptions of her childhood summers. Though it feels different from how she remembers.",
 "dialog": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/A Thousand Correspondences. A custom outfit made of fine and lightweight material, tailored based on Heidi's descriptions of her childhood summers. Though it feels different from how she remembers.",
 "usage": "One of Heidi's casual outfits.",
 "description": "Heidi has sent a thousand letters, ranging from her teenage dreams to heartfelt essays, keeping the replies in a box she carries around. She has met some of her recipients, but others she will never hear from again.",

 "skinGroupId": "2023#epoque#6",
 "skinGroupName": "EPOQUE/XXIV",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 41,
 "content": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/Invitation. A set of formalwear Harmonie wears while enjoying the afternoon in her study. The smart tailoring makes her skirt move in a beautiful curve, and the fabrics are specially chosen to hide any stray fur stuck on her clothes.",
 "dialog": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/Invitation. A set of formalwear Harmonie wears while enjoying the afternoon in her study. The smart tailoring makes her skirt move in a beautiful curve, and the fabrics are specially chosen to hide any stray fur stuck on her clothes.",
 "usage": "One of Harmonie's casual outfits.",
 "description": "Harmonie rarely allows anyone into her study, a private space for her alone. The room is furnished with elegant furniture, but she is happy to sit on the table with her tail slightly raised, her staff teasing the sunlight.",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 78,
 "displayTagId": null,
 "getTime": 1698148800,
 "onYear": 3,
 "onPeriod": 16
 }
 },

 "YUJI"\
 \],
 "designerList": null,
 "skinGroupId": "2023#epoque#7",
 "skinGroupName": "EPOQUE/XXV",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 42,
 "content": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/Her Aspiration. The clothes Astgenne wore in her rented home. A lab coat thrown over an elegant and close fit, for she must always be ready for a whimsical stroke of inspiration for her experiments.",
 "dialog": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/Her Aspiration. The clothes Astgenne wore in her rented home. A lab coat thrown over an elegant and close fit, for she must always be ready for a whimsical stroke of inspiration for her experiments.",
 "usage": "One of Astgenne's casual outfits.",
 "description": "The faint light of the stars is unable to penetrate the depths of the darkness, but she firmly believes that the light she's after will be enough to illuminate every nook and cranny of this land.",

 "content": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/Sunny Day. Cardigan's outfit when she had just arrived at a city in southern Leithanien. Skillfully tailored to fit a young girl's stature. Light, airy, and blooming with vitality.",
 "dialog": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/Sunny Day. Cardigan's outfit when she had just arrived at a city in southern Leithanien. Skillfully tailored to fit a young girl's stature. Light, airy, and blooming with vitality.",
 "usage": "One of Cardigan's casual outfits.",
 "description": "As she jumps out the window and faces the sun, she can't help but believe that her future will be as bright as it is today.",

 "skinGroupName": "EPOQUE/XXVII",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 44,
 "content": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/The Other Side of Siracusa. Does he not occasionally wear a plain jacket and hoodie instead of a tailored suit, and sit-down at a not-quite traditional Siracusan restaurant?",
 "dialog": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/The Other Side of Siracusa. Does he not occasionally wear a plain jacket and hoodie instead of a tailored suit, and sit-down at a not-quite traditional Siracusan restaurant?",
 "usage": "One of Vigil's casual outfits.",
 "description": "He wanted to see with his own eyes the side of Siracusa that was not so Siracusan. When he noticed the gazes of those assessing him from the corners of the restaurant, he realized that such a Siracusa does not yet exist.",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 81,
 "displayTagId": null,
 "getTime": 1716483600,
 "onYear": 4,

 }

 "skinGroupId": "2023#epoque#10",
 "skinGroupName": "EPOQUE/XXVIII",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 45,
 "content": "EPOQUE Sub-Brand \[Passe\] Series Selects/Gwiazdcytrony. Meteor's winter clothes from back in Kazimierz. Balancing lightness and warmth, they also allow one to easily hide in dense forests. A reproduction.",
 "dialog": "EPOQUE Sub-Brand \[Passe\] Series Selects/Gwiazdcytrony. Meteor's winter clothes from back in Kazimierz. Balancing lightness and warmth, they also allow one to easily hide in dense forests. A reproduction.",
 "usage": "One of Meteor's casual outfits.",
 "description": "Gwiazdcytron trees can only grow in Kazimierz. In the times they still remember, the forest wardens are warm and safe, just like their hometown.",
 "obtainApproach": "Event Reward",
 "sortId": 82,
 "displayTagId": "Event Reward",

 "skinGroupId": "2023#epoque#10",
 "skinGroupName": "EPOQUE/XXVIII",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 45,
 "content": "EPOQUE Sub-Brand \[Passe\] Series Selects/W Dali. Młynar's attire as a knight-errant, wandering Kazimierz's plains and endless forests, the words engraved on the hilt of his sword not yet covered by useless trinkets.",
 "dialog": "EPOQUE Sub-Brand \[Passe\] Series Selects/W Dali. Młynar's attire as a knight-errant, wandering Kazimierz's plains and endless forests, the words engraved on the hilt of his sword not yet covered by useless trinkets.",
 "usage": "One of Młynar's casual outfits.",
 "description": "He has spent a long time searching, yet is still where he started. The night before news arrived of a Nearl family swordstaff entering Leithanien, he could not help seeing some long-lost silhouettes through the torrential rain.",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 83,
 "displayTagId": null,
 "getTime": 1714496400,
 "onYear": 4,
 "onPeriod": 7
 }
 },

 "skinGroupName": "EPOQUE/XXVIII",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 45,
 "content": "EPOQUE Sub-Brand \[Passe\] Series Selects/Royal Guardswoman. Bagpipe's uniform as a new cadet at the military academy, doubling as formal wear. Training in formal wear was yet another duty of a royal guardsman cadet.",
 "dialog": "EPOQUE Sub-Brand \[Passe\] Series Selects/Royal Guardswoman. Bagpipe's uniform as a new cadet at the military academy, doubling as formal wear. Training in formal wear was yet another duty of a royal guardsman cadet.",
 "usage": "One of Bagpipe's casual outfits.",
 "description": "The young lady always seems to be staring off in a daze these days. Not because she's surrounded by unfamiliar people, but rather she's secretly worried that she put on her uniform in the wrong order.",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 84,
 "displayTagId": null,

 }

 "skinGroupName": "EPOQUE/XXVIII",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 45,
 "content": "EPOQUE Sub-Brand \[Passe\] Series Selects/Noon Twilight. Absinthe's former school uniform. In Ursus, students wear their uniforms while exercising, resembling a field of neatly spaced seedlings behind a plow.",
 "dialog": "EPOQUE Sub-Brand \[Passe\] Series Selects/Noon Twilight. Absinthe's former school uniform. In Ursus, students wear their uniforms while exercising, resembling a field of neatly spaced seedlings behind a plow.",
 "usage": "One of Absinthe's casual outfits.",
 "description": "'Tis a shame that the sunlight always shines upon this plow for far too short. But before that spring, she still did not understand such things.",

 "skinGroupName": "EPOQUE/XXVIII",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 45,
 "content": "EPOQUE Sub-Brand \[Passe\] Series Selects/Lances of Kaliskas. Ashlock's formalwear, worn when her family banished her. Traditional dress worthy of a Kazimierz knight, not entirely inappropriate on her.",
 "dialog": "EPOQUE Sub-Brand \[Passe\] Series Selects/Lances of Kaliskas. Ashlock's formalwear, worn when her family banished her. Traditional dress worthy of a Kazimierz knight, not entirely inappropriate on her.",
 "usage": "One of Ashlock's casual outfits.",
 "description": "But of that moonless night, only these clothes and the lady of a lance born remained presentable. Everything else had taken on terrible, pitch-black forms.",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",

 "skinGroupName": "EPOQUE/XXIX",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 46,
 "content": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/Amidst the Pieces. Puzzle knows that he should tailor his attire to his target—one of the most efficient ways to win trust and exchange intel. When alone, however, he barely spares a thought to his appearance.",
 "dialog": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/Amidst the Pieces. Puzzle knows that he should tailor his attire to his target—one of the most efficient ways to win trust and exchange intel. When alone, however, he barely spares a thought to his appearance.",
 "usage": "One of Puzzle's casual outfits.",
 "description": "'These tweezers? I use them to pick up puzzle pieces. The ones too small or too thin are rather difficult to grasp with your fingers. They have no other use apart from this.'",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 87,
 "displayTagId": null,
 "getTime": 1724259600,

 "skinGroupName": "EPOQUE/XXIX",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 46,
 "content": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/Nighttime Café. Always meticulous, Ansel likes to be properly dressed at the café as well. He steadfastly refuses to sell coffee at night, however.",
 "dialog": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/Nighttime Café. Always meticulous, Ansel likes to be properly dressed at the café as well. He steadfastly refuses to sell coffee at night, however.",
 "usage": "One of Ansel's casual outfits.",
 "description": "'If nocturnality is a racial trait, couldn't you at least provide coffee at night for other Cautus operators? No? But you drink it every night!'",

 "content": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/Major Field. Practical yet dignified, it protects from the elements on field surveys, but can also be worn under a jacket for conferences.",

 "usage": "One of Earthspirit's casual outfits.",

 "skinGroupName": "EPOQUE/XXXI",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 48,
 "content": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/Courtesy. Lungmen's latest trend, seamlessly blending ancient and modern Yanese charm. To Qiubai, the art of tea and the sword are the same in that both require full attention and to know when to stop.",
 "dialog": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/Courtesy. Lungmen's latest trend, seamlessly blending ancient and modern Yanese charm. To Qiubai, the art of tea and the sword are the same in that both require full attention and to know when to stop.",
 "usage": "One of Qiubai's casual outfits.",
 "description": "Shapeless sword, formless air, sights of seasons also bare. Guests of groves and guests of tea, snow and wind shall come to thee.",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 92,
 "displayTagId": null,

 }
 },

 "content": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/Leisure. The season's latest leisurewear in Columbia. Detachable straps and pouches let Corroserum show off the many delights of his spring travels.",
 "dialog": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/Leisure. The season's latest leisurewear in Columbia. Detachable straps and pouches let Corroserum show off the many delights of his spring travels.",
 "usage": "One of Corroserum's casual outfits.",

 "skinGroupName": "EPOQUE/XXXI",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 48,
 "content": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/New Business. Cement's survey consultant outfit. Snug and durable, the contrast of the hoodie and jacket brings out her vitality. She also gets herself a pair of goggles to match with them.",
 "dialog": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/New Business. Cement's survey consultant outfit. Snug and durable, the contrast of the hoodie and jacket brings out her vitality. She also gets herself a pair of goggles to match with them.",
 "usage": "One of Cement's casual outfits.",
 "description": "This is the first time Shana Moleman has left Rim Billiton. She takes off her hard hat for a moment. A survey drone flies high in the sky. This time, it illuminates more than just the darkness of the mineshaft.",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 94,
 "displayTagId": null,
 "getTime": 1728561600,
 "onYear": 4,
 "onPeriod": 13
 }
 },

 "skinGroupName": "EPOQUE/XXXI",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 48,
 "content": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/Season of Travel. Pinecone's outfit while visiting family in Columbia. The jacket's jade trim outlines the simple dress with a vibrant aura. An unintentional pairing, yet perfect for spring.",
 "dialog": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/Season of Travel. Pinecone's outfit while visiting family in Columbia. The jacket's jade trim outlines the simple dress with a vibrant aura. An unintentional pairing, yet perfect for spring.",
 "usage": "One of Pinecone's casual outfits.",
 "description": "Pinecone is about to leave that small town once more. Knowing his daughter no longer has to worry about the future, the laborer suddenly stuffs a doll into her hands. She stares at it in a daze, but luckily the little guy waves a hand in her stead.",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 95,
 "displayTagId": null,
 "getTime": 1728561600,
 "onYear": 4,
 "onPeriod": 13
 }
 },

 "content": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/Habitat. Silence's dress for public events. She's been busy of late, and drifts to sleep in front of the camera. Luckily, she has Ifrit's handmade alarm clock to help her stay awake.",
 "dialog": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/Habitat. Silence's dress for public events. She's been busy of late, and drifts to sleep in front of the camera. Luckily, she has Ifrit's handmade alarm clock to help her stay awake.",
 "usage": "One of Silence the Paradigmatic's casual outfits.",
 "description": "All foresight needs a place to rest, and that habitat is where all living things stand.",

 "skinGroupId": "2024#epoque#4",
 "skinGroupName": "Epoque/XXXIII",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 50,
 "content": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/I Am the Tides. An outfit Gladiia often wears. With the tides, she comes and goes freely between land and sea. The hunter is at ease, for the hunter is the tide.",
 "dialog": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/I Am the Tides. An outfit Gladiia often wears. With the tides, she comes and goes freely between land and sea. The hunter is at ease, for the hunter is the tide.",
 "usage": "One of Gladiia's casual outfits.",
 "description": "She may prefer the classics, but even she is not immune to change. At her team's recommendation, she changes her wardrobe and hair once more. There is no trace of coldness in her step, and her every movement is graceful, as she always has been.",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 97,
 "displayTagId": null,
 "getTime": 1733227200,
 "onYear": 4,
 "onPeriod": 17
 }
 },

 "skinGroupSortIndex": 50,
 "content": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/Scribing. The dust settles, the noise stops, and Nuova Volsinii finally quiets down. Here, the judge sheds her robes of the law, and with pen in hand, she writes of the turmoil that once rocked Siracusa.",
 "dialog": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/Scribing. The dust settles, the noise stops, and Nuova Volsinii finally quiets down. Here, the judge sheds her robes of the law, and with pen in hand, she writes of the turmoil that once rocked Siracusa.",
 "usage": "One of Penance's casual outfits.",
 "description": "A parting is not always caused by cruelty, just as a record does not always stem from remembrance.",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",

 "skinGroupName": "Epoque/XXXIII",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 50,
 "content": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/For the Banquet. Melanite once attended a banquet hosting people from across the industry. On careful consideration, she chose this gown to hide her true purpose for attending.",
 "dialog": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/For the Banquet. Melanite once attended a banquet hosting people from across the industry. On careful consideration, she chose this gown to hide her true purpose for attending.",

 "skinGroupId": "2024#epoque#5",
 "skinGroupName": "Epoque/XXXIV",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 51,
 "content": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/A Picnic Before A Long Trip. Bam! Everyone's become teeny-tiny, must be another one of Dolly's pranks! Good thing the cream didn't stain her dress, because Eyjafjalla will need it for a dance of azure blue.",
 "dialog": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/A Picnic Before A Long Trip. Bam! Everyone's become teeny-tiny, must be another one of Dolly's pranks! Good thing the cream didn't stain her dress, because Eyjafjalla will need it for a dance of azure blue.",
 "usage": "One of Eyjafjalla the Hvít Aska's casual outfits.",
 "description": "'Where's our next stop, little lamb? The ocean of pink? The erupting volcano? There's still lots of places I'd love to go. Once we're done with this cake, we can head off~'",

 "skinGroupName": "Epoque/XXXIV",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 51,
 "content": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/To Rest in Night Breezes. Siesta welcomes back any and all weary wanderers. Fresh-off-the-truck Ann-Maier puts on her favorite ensemble to hit the beach, taking in the quiet sands as day turns to night.",
 "dialog": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/To Rest in Night Breezes. Siesta welcomes back any and all weary wanderers. Fresh-off-the-truck Ann-Maier puts on her favorite ensemble to hit the beach, taking in the quiet sands as day turns to night.",
 "usage": "One of Poncirus's casual outfits.",
 "description": "The sun hasn't set quite yet, and the night breeze blows across the city, the refreshing wind taking away her worries and sorrows for the moment.",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 101,

 "getTime": 1737046800,
 "onYear": 5,

 }

 "skinGroupId": "2024#epoque#7",
 "skinGroupName": "EPOQUE/XXXVI",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 53,
 "content": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/Il Segreto Della Notte. A form-fitting combination of tailored clothes and exquisite accessories, displaying one's status without drawing too much attention. Comes with a VIP Carnevale invitation and too many balloons.",
 "dialog": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/Il Segreto Della Notte. A form-fitting combination of tailored clothes and exquisite accessories, displaying one's status without drawing too much attention. Comes with a VIP Carnevale invitation and too many balloons.",
 "usage": "One of Texas the Omertosa's casual outfits.",
 "description": "Yet another Carnevale, and all Texas wants is to relax, but her annoying boss has hidden himself in every balloon, telling her to get back to work. Nothing she can do except step on each and every one of them.",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 103,
 "displayTagId": null,

 }

 "skinGroupName": "EPOQUE/XXXVII",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 54,
 "content": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/Sun Slant. After sorting through his attic, Diamante finally pieced together a web connecting the nobles to the mining accident twenty years ago. As he rubs his aching neck, the sunlight seeps in through the window.",
 "dialog": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/Sun Slant. After sorting through his attic, Diamante finally pieced together a web connecting the nobles to the mining accident twenty years ago. As he rubs his aching neck, the sunlight seeps in through the window.",
 "usage": "One of Diamante's casual outfits.",
 "description": "Now that everything has been laid bare and the plan has run through his mind countless times, he knows what he must do next.",
 "obtainApproach": "Event Reward",

 "skinGroupName": "0011 Productions/XI",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 74,
 "content": "0011 New Arrivals/Almond Platter. Outfit Almond wore during a field mission in Yan. Deep crimsons are a natural complement to the festive atmosphere, while the long skirt and wide sleeves bring out her latent cuteness.",
 "dialog": "0011 New Arrivals/Almond Platter. Outfit Almond wore during a field mission in Yan. Deep crimsons are a natural complement to the festive atmosphere, while the long skirt and wide sleeves bring out her latent cuteness.",
 "usage": "One of Almond's casual outfits.",
 "description": "Almond looks around her. Sesame balls, green peas, biscuits, jujubes... All in all, a very sweet dream. But she soon realizes she's at the center of the platter. 'Hey, am I one of the snacks—?!'",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 105,
 "displayTagId": null,
 "getTime": 1752771600,
 "onYear": 5,
 "onPeriod": 11
 }

 "skinGroupName": "0011 Productions/XI",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 74,
 "content": "0011 New Arrivals/Prairie Pals. Outfit Bena wore on a field mission in the prairie. The traditional clothes serving as the base have been enhanced with modern innovations, making them lightweight without sacrificing cuteness.",
 "dialog": "0011 New Arrivals/Prairie Pals. Outfit Bena wore on a field mission in the prairie. The traditional clothes serving as the base have been enhanced with modern innovations, making them lightweight without sacrificing cuteness.",
 "usage": "One of Bena's casual outfits.",
 "description": "Bena dreamed. In the dream, the master of a super-big steamer basket told her that as long as she was willing to help, she could have some real yummy xiaolongbao. And so, Bena picked up her rod, sat down on a Beast Steward, and... started running errands!",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 106,
 "displayTagId": null,
 "getTime": 1752771600,
 "onYear": 5,
 "onPeriod": 11
 }
 },

 "skinGroupId": "2025#epoque",
 "skinGroupName": "EPOQUE/XXXVIII",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 55,
 "content": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/Cover Mercenary. Clothes Quartz wore when she was invited to a magazine shoot. Minimalist yet stylish, daring yet elegant. A mercenary's aura adds a touch of mystique to this outfit.",
 "dialog": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/Cover Mercenary. Clothes Quartz wore when she was invited to a magazine shoot. Minimalist yet stylish, daring yet elegant. A mercenary's aura adds a touch of mystique to this outfit.",
 "usage": "One of Quartz's casual outfits.",
 "description": "Quartz nearly fell over the first time she put on high heels, but she quickly got used to them, going back to her usual cool self in front of the camera—Oh no, she's not trying to look cool, she just doesn't know what expression to make! Go help her, quick!",
 "obtainApproach": "Event Reward",
 "sortId": 107,
 "displayTagId": "Seasonal Attire",
 "getTime": 1755190800,
 "onYear": 5,
 "onPeriod": 12
 }
 },

 "skinGroupId": "2025#epoque#2",
 "skinGroupName": "EPOQUE/XXXIX",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 56,
 "content": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/Sent from Ognisko. Clothes Viviana wore on a short return trip to Ognisko, a pure linen dress paired with a knitted shawl. With these, she wanders the city of shady trees and the sounds of artisans.",
 "dialog": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/Sent from Ognisko. Clothes Viviana wore on a short return trip to Ognisko, a pure linen dress paired with a knitted shawl. With these, she wanders the city of shady trees and the sounds of artisans.",
 "usage": "One of Viviana's casual outfits.",
 "description": "The weather vane points to today's destination. Her felt friends escort her there, while every nameless roadside flower blooms among her idle thoughts. She may soon leave again, but her time here will be forever preserved in poetry.",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 108,
 "displayTagId": null,
 "getTime": 1754586000,
 "onYear": 5,
 "onPeriod": 12
 }
 },

 "skinGroupName": "EPOQUE/XXXIX",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 56,
 "content": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/Echo of Bagpipes. Clothes Bagpipe wears when she heads home. No need for any fancy accessories. A simple dress and a bright smile are enough to charm even the critters frolicking by her side.",
 "dialog": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/Echo of Bagpipes. Clothes Bagpipe wears when she heads home. No need for any fancy accessories. A simple dress and a bright smile are enough to charm even the critters frolicking by her side.",
 "usage": "One of Bagpipe's casual outfits.",
 "description": "The life Bagpipe dreams of is simple. After a productive day of farmwork, she picks up the satisfaction of a hard day's work and her hopes for a bumper crop before walking home under the setting sun, accompanied by the distant sound of bagpipes. It will come true. She believes it with all her heart.",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 109,
 "displayTagId": null,
 "getTime": 1754586000,
 "onYear": 5,
 "onPeriod": 12
 }
 },

 "skinGroupId": "2025#epoque#2",
 "skinGroupName": "EPOQUE/XXXIX",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 56,
 "content": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/Frosted Steps. Outfit Matoimaru wore when taking part in a period piece. An elegant Higashinese dress combined with delicate makeup bring out her hidden charms in all their glory.",
 "dialog": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/Frosted Steps. Outfit Matoimaru wore when taking part in a period piece. An elegant Higashinese dress combined with delicate makeup bring out her hidden charms in all their glory.",
 "usage": "One of Matoimaru's casual outfits.",
 "description": "'She walked down the towering steps, one by one, like a goddess descending from the mountains.' Everyone was stunned into silence by Matoimaru's performance. They could not help but wonder: Is she an acting genius? Or is she actually—",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 110,
 "displayTagId": null,
 "getTime": 1754586000,
 "onYear": 5,

 }
 },

 "designerList": null,
 "skinGroupId": "2025#epoque#3",
 "skinGroupName": "EPOQUE/XXXX",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 57,
 "content": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/Tons of Sunshine. Clothes Wanqing wears for work. White singlet, tight-fitting yet breathable pants, and a dirt-repellent apron. A simple ensemble that becomes harmony itself on him.",
 "dialog": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/Tons of Sunshine. Clothes Wanqing wears for work. White singlet, tight-fitting yet breathable pants, and a dirt-repellent apron. A simple ensemble that becomes harmony itself on him.",
 "usage": "One of Wanqing's casual outfits.",
 "description": "'Why is it that the crops Wanqing harvests always turn out so good?' 'They don't just get a lot of natural sunlight, they get the light of his pearly whites too. With that much sunshine, how can you _not_ end up tasty as heck?'",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 111,
 "displayTagId": null,
 "getTime": 1751562000,
 "onYear": 5,
 "onPeriod": 10
 }
 },

 "skinGroupName": "EPOQUE/XLI",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 58,
 "content": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/Sweetness to the Heart. Outfit Nymph put together in preparation for the tea party. Light and comfortable, with just the right amount of sweetness. Maybe she has her own sugary secret recipe?",
 "dialog": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/Sweetness to the Heart. Outfit Nymph put together in preparation for the tea party. Light and comfortable, with just the right amount of sweetness. Maybe she has her own sugary secret recipe?",
 "usage": "One of Nymph's casual outfits.",
 "description": "After trying the desserts Nymph brought along, there is not a soul who is not wondering about the secret behind their incredible sweetness.",

 "content": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/Midskog Fika. Celebratory dress prepared by Valarqvin for a rare day of melted snow. Adorned with bright grass and flower motifs, which are infused with beautiful meaning in Sami.",
 "dialog": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/Midskog Fika. Celebratory dress prepared by Valarqvin for a rare day of melted snow. Adorned with bright grass and flower motifs, which are infused with beautiful meaning in Sami.",
 "usage": "One of Valarqvin's casual outfits.",
 "description": "Her gaze is not solely focused on a future of bitter frost. She also peeks at a warm day spent frolicking through the forest.",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",

 "dialog": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/Plush Cake. On her off days, Dur-nar changes out of her well-worn battlefield clothes to try something a little more fun. She's well versed in balancing work and play, and an expert in enjoying life.",

 "dialog": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/Playfellows. Comfy casual clothes Vermeil changed into, sharing the dolls she collected with everyone at the party. Who would've thought she had such a cute collection?",

 "skinGroupName": "EPOQUE/XLIII",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 60,
 "content": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/Bard by the Lake. Attire Cantabile wore during her lakeside holiday. The white of the dress is in perfect harmony with the natural environment, creating a tranquil, dream-like ambience.",
 "dialog": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/Bard by the Lake. Attire Cantabile wore during her lakeside holiday. The white of the dress is in perfect harmony with the natural environment, creating a tranquil, dream-like ambience.",
 "usage": "One of Cantabile's casual outfits.",
 "description": "As Cantabile's slender fingers pluck at the strings, a melodious song begins to play across the lake. Her holiday is not a long one, but at the very least, at this very moment, she wants to forget it all, and allow herself to soak in the tranquility.",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 116,
 "displayTagId": null,
 "getTime": 1760443200,
 "onYear": 5,
 "onPeriod": 17
 }
 },

 "skinGroupId": "2025#epoque#7",
 "skinGroupName": "EPOQUE/XLIV",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 61,
 "content": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/Tidal Bore. Clothes Lucilla wore when looking around an exhibit about extinct marine species. The eye is led down the outfit by the changes in color mimicking seawater at different depths, punctuated by unique patterns to form a calm, tranquil ensemble.",
 "dialog": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/Tidal Bore. Clothes Lucilla wore when looking around an exhibit about extinct marine species. The eye is led down the outfit by the changes in color mimicking seawater at different depths, punctuated by unique patterns to form a calm, tranquil ensemble.",
 "usage": "One of Lucilla's casual outfits.",
 "description": "Lucilla hypothesizes that there are yet more marine species out there that are being driven to extinction by the Seaborn, but she does not have the leisure to grieve for them for long. She tries to dig up more information, all the better to make traps for capturing Seaborn. She's already got plenty of new ideas.",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 117,
 "displayTagId": null,
 "getTime": 1763046000,
 "onYear": 5,
 "onPeriod": 19
 }
 },

 "skinGroupId": "2025#epoque#7",
 "skinGroupName": "EPOQUE/XLIV",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 61,
 "content": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/Stranded. Recreation of clothes Highmore wore in her hometown. Custom-made flexible support materials keep the skirt puffy, while ribbons of pure white gently sway, giving form to the unknowable sea breeze.",
 "dialog": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/Stranded. Recreation of clothes Highmore wore in her hometown. Custom-made flexible support materials keep the skirt puffy, while ribbons of pure white gently sway, giving form to the unknowable sea breeze.",
 "usage": "One of Highmore's casual outfits.",
 "description": "Highmore searches along the seashore. The warm light of the lantern shines upon countless tiny carapaces and bleached bones. They are stranded in the shallows, far, far from home in both distance and time. Highmore stops to listen to the sea breeze, and the nostalgic song it carries.",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 118,
 "displayTagId": null,
 "getTime": 1763046000,
 "onYear": 5,
 "onPeriod": 19
 }
 },

 "skinGroupId": "2025#epoque#8",
 "skinGroupName": "EPOQUE/XLV",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 62,
 "content": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/Laminar Flow. Clothes Underflow wore to the theater in Ægir. Lightweight armor and a tailored skirt come together to form a balance between comfort and defense.",
 "dialog": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/Laminar Flow. Clothes Underflow wore to the theater in Ægir. Lightweight armor and a tailored skirt come together to form a balance between comfort and defense.",
 "usage": "One of Underflow's casual outfits.",
 "description": "The curtain falls without a single mistake during the performance. Even without a pen, Underflow is able to freely analyze and connect all the details. She enjoyed this holistic work, and gives it her sincere admiration.",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 119,

 }

 "designerList": null,
 "skinGroupId": "2025#epoque#9",
 "skinGroupName": "EPOQUE/XLVI",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 63,
 "content": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/Behind the Words. Morgan's outfit for when she's drafting her next work. A classic windbreaker makes an odd pairing for form-fitting innerwear, a bold statement showing that a serious attitude and a rebellious personality don't have to clash.",
 "dialog": "EPOQUE Collection New Arrivals/Behind the Words. Morgan's outfit for when she's drafting her next work. A classic windbreaker makes an odd pairing for form-fitting innerwear, a bold statement showing that a serious attitude and a rebellious personality don't have to clash.",
 "usage": "One of Morgan's casual outfits.",
 "description": "'Aside from memoirs, I do occasionally write fiction. Here, have a peek—Oh, don't mind the wine stains, but the characters' deeds feel mighty familiar, don't they? Doesn't matter what I write—my pen hand keeps going back to the old gang. It's a real headache, I tell you!'",
 "obtainApproach": "Event Reward",
 "sortId": 120,
 "displayTagId": "Event Reward",
 "getTime": 1763650800,
 "onYear": 5,
 "onPeriod": 19
 }
 },

 "content": "0011 New Arrivals/Night Watcher. Handmade by Lungmen craftsman, this stylish outfit combines comfortable materials with cutting-edge tech and traditional handicraft. Custom-made services are also available. Fireproof.",
 "dialog": "0011 New Arrivals/Night Watcher. Handmade by Lungmen craftsman, this stylish outfit combines comfortable materials with cutting-edge tech and traditional handicraft. Custom-made services are also available. Fireproof.",
 "usage": "One of Hibiscus's favorite new outfits.",
 "description": "To give the most beautiful smile to the last sleepless night of the year.",

 "content": "0011 New Arrivals/Ageless Afterglow. Handcrafted by Lungmen artisans, this tailor-made dress is comfortable, beautiful, and accentuates one's figure. By popular request, it has been made to be a bit sportier than the standard line.",

 "content": "0011 New Arrivals/Clivia. Handmade by Lungmen craftsman, this outfit enjoys several benefits from its high-tech materials: light weight, breathability and durability.  "dialog": "0011 New Arrivals/Clivia. Handmade by Lungmen craftsman, this stylish outfit combines comfortable materials with cutting-edge tech and traditional handicraft. Get this spring special while it's still available!",

 "description": "I'd like to try an Eastern-style outfit every now and then.",

 "content": "0011 Tempest-Series New Arrival/Patrolling Ronin. Several designers joined forces to create a look inspired by the style of the streets. Complete with the redesigned shield of an L.G.D. Officer joined with traditional elements from Higashi, this outfit brings a truly formidable look.",

 "skinGroupSortIndex": 66,
 "content": "0011 New Arrivals/Unfettered Freedom. Handcrafted by Lungmen artisans, per the client's requests, twenty-four different designs of traditional women's clothing were drawn up, from which the client rolled dice to select one to ultimately be made into an outfit.",
 "dialog": "0011 New Arrivals/Unfettered Freedom. Handcrafted by Lungmen artisans, per the client's requests, twenty-four different designs of traditional women's clothing were drawn up, from which the client rolled dice to select one to ultimately be made into an outfit.",
 "usage": "One of Nian's casual outfits.",
 "description": "It bugged her how these clothes didn't fit well, so she picked a few places to make a couple of tweaks herself.",

 "content": "0011 New Arrivals/Just A Driver. Handcrafted by Lungmen artisans, with a design concept more inclined towards the West, its main appeal being to create a balanced sense of uniform. Many fasteners adorn the outfit, reserving space for the client to personalize, mix and match.",
 "dialog": "0011 New Arrivals/Just A Driver. Handcrafted by Lungmen artisans, with a design concept more inclined towards the West, its main appeal being to create a balanced sense of uniform. Many fasteners adorn the outfit, reserving space for the client to personalize, mix and match.",

 "content": "0011 New Arrivals/Tremble Cold. Handcrafted by Lungmen artisans, the typical clothing assembly process was refined in accordance with Ægir bodily characteristics, and the outfit displays a uniquely streamlined effect in turn. Color choices are made independently by the client.",
 "dialog": "0011 New Arrivals/Tremble Cold. Handcrafted by Lungmen artisans, the typical clothing assembly process was refined in accordance with Ægir bodily characteristics, and the outfit displays a uniquely streamlined effect in turn. Color choices are made independently by the client.",

 "content": "0011 New Arrivals/Healing Hand, Evil Heart. Handmade in Lungmen, the outfit includes multiple pieces of clothing that can be mixed and matched based on the customer's mood. The details in the outfit have been adjusted according to his needs, and includes an old-fashioned medicine box.",
 "dialog": "0011 New Arrivals/Healing Hand, Evil Heart. Handmade in Lungmen, the outfit includes multiple pieces of clothing that can be mixed and matched based on the customer's mood. The details in the outfit have been adjusted according to his needs, and includes an old-fashioned medicine box.",
 "usage": "One of Aak's casual outfits.",
 "description": "Practicing medicine is like spraying pesticide. It can uproot disease, or it can snuff out life. Life or death begins with the formula, ends with the dosage, and depends entirely on intent.",

 "content": "0011 New Release / Dusk Wisteria. Handmade in Lungmen, tailor-fitted with special consideration to exotic design elements. The outfit has been improved in accordance with the customer's preference to incorporate Yan's novel trends.",

 "content": "0011 New Release / Everything Is a Miracle. A silky and delicate satin surface, perfectly fitted to the wearer's body shape. Blue-green envelops the body, invoking an ancient charm. After completing the outfit's design, the client draws it into existence, ready-to-wear, with a stroke of the brush.",
 "dialog": "0011 New Release / Everything Is a Miracle. A silky and delicate satin surface, perfectly fitted to the wearer's body shape. Blue-green envelops the body, invoking an ancient charm. After completing the outfit's design, the client draws it into existence, ready-to-wear, with a stroke of the brush.",
 "usage": "One of Dusk's casual outfits.",
 "description": "The distant mountains are as ink, each step leaving smoke. Falling ink becomes art, plain colors reflect the self.",

 "content": "0011 New Release / Gourmet. FEater's outfit from a bestselling Lungmen foodie film. Incorporates a sporty inner layer and a traditional knotted jacked, once all the rage.",
 "dialog": "0011 New Release / Gourmet. FEater's outfit from a bestselling Lungmen foodie film. Incorporates a sporty inner layer and a traditional knotted jacked, once all the rage.",

 "skinGroupName": "0011 Productions/VI",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 69,
 "content": "0011 New Release / Serene Day. Handmade in Lungmen. The fabric is light and comfortable, using the client's favorite purple color as a base and embellished with dark lines. Casual yet dignified, it is perfect for all sorts of occasions.",
 "dialog": "0011 New Release / Serene Day. Handmade in Lungmen. The fabric is light and comfortable, using the client's favorite purple color as a base and embellished with dark lines. Casual yet dignified, it is perfect for all sorts of occasions.",
 "usage": "One of Indigo's casual outfits.",
 "description": "A serene day, the moon in her teacup, surrounded by indulgent flowers... It is rather difficult for Indigo to understand this scenery.",
 "obtainApproach": "Event Reward",
 "sortId": 136,
 "displayTagId": "Event Reward",
 "getTime": 1660129200,
 "onYear": 2,
 "onPeriod": 12
 }
 },

 "content": "0011 New Arrivals/It Does Wash the Strings. Robe made from white cloth, with loose-fitting sleeves that reach to knee level. A lucky animal is weaved onto the skirt, inspired by a dream the client had.",
 "dialog": "0011 New Arrivals/It Does Wash the Strings. Robe made from white cloth, with loose-fitting sleeves that reach to knee level. A lucky animal is weaved onto the skirt, inspired by a dream the client had.",
 "usage": "One of Ling's casual outfits.",
 "description": "'Who am I?' 'What am I?' 'Where do I go?' 'Thunder with no rain, bones to dust. The dreamer must wake, the calm be disturbed. Why ask?'",

 "content": "0011 Tempest Series New Arrivals/'Afternoon Teatime'. A cozy, snug-fitting exercise wardrobe paired with a vivid jacket, ensuring the customer will be the center of attention wherever they go.",

 "usage": "One of Aciddrop's casual outfits.",
 "description": "To Aciddrop, 'afternoon teatime' should really mean chowing down on a pizza meal set for one, grabbing a canvas to test out a spray can, then putting foot to board and heading out for a free skate, destination nada.",

 "skinGroupName": "0011/Tempest/V",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 79,
 "content": "0011 Tempest Series/The Road to Here. Loose-fitting coat that can envelop a young girl. The waterproof fabric makes it suitable for a rainy day.",
 "dialog": "0011 Tempest Series/The Road to Here. Loose-fitting coat that can envelop a young girl. The waterproof fabric makes it suitable for a rainy day.",
 "usage": "One of Paprika's casual outfits.",
 "description": "Raindrops drown out footsteps, the crowd comes and goes, and no one notices that she has stopped. It is an unremarkable city, but she remembers how long it took for her to cross the ruins and wastes to set foot here.",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",

 "skinGroupName": "0011/Tempest/VI",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 80,
 "content": "0011 Tempest Series New Arrivals/One Blade. Form-fitting, cool, and breathable sportswear, for those patrolling the streets. In a fistfight, the flowing scarlet sleeves become a raging flame. The accompanying sword is most certainly not a prop.",
 "dialog": "0011 Tempest Series New Arrivals/One Blade. Form-fitting, cool, and breathable sportswear, for those patrolling the streets. In a fistfight, the flowing scarlet sleeves become a raging flame. The accompanying sword is most certainly not a prop.",
 "usage": "One of Flamebringer's casual outfits.",
 "description": "He himself was not as brash as his outfit, and he took out his sword only to take photos. But even with only a single blade, when it came time to help others, he did not doubt himself for a second.",
 "obtainApproach": "Event Reward",
 "sortId": 150,
 "displayTagId": "Seasonal Attire",

 "onPeriod": 8

 "skinGroupName": "0011/Tempest/VII",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 81,
 "content": "0011 Tempest Series New Arrivals/Ignis Fatuus. A gift for Lessing from some young Liches, for taking the brunt of their teacher's ire. Though it's the opposite of his usual style, he looks surprisingly cool in it.",
 "dialog": "0011 Tempest Series New Arrivals/Ignis Fatuus. A gift for Lessing from some young Liches, for taking the brunt of their teacher's ire. Though it's the opposite of his usual style, he looks surprisingly cool in it.",
 "usage": "One of Lessing's casual outfits.",
 "description": "Lessing hasn't said what he thinks of this outfit, and some suspect that trying a new style might be a form of 'training under pressure' for him. He's been wearing it for a few days now, though. He has to like them, right?",

 "content": "Witch Feast Series/the mag. An outfit that Kroos designed for herself. In addition to being fashionable, it incorporates some mechanisms to assist her with her magic tricks.",

 "content": "Witch Feast Role-Playing Script 'Horrorlair's Enigma' Custom Line/Moon Catastrborn. The actor plays the role of the heir of bane who descends upon Terra after rending the moon into twins. The hero stands no chance in a head-on fight.",
 "dialog": "Witch Feast Role-Playing Script 'Horrorlair's Enigma' Custom Line/Moon Catastrborn. The actor plays the role of the heir of bane who descends upon Terra after rending the moon into twins. The hero stands no chance in a head-on fight.",
 "usage": "One of Blemishine's costumes.",
 "description": "Everybody knows Blemishine isn't cut out to be the bad guy, but isn't that what makes it fun? Anyway, she and her family there are just out to have fun, they're not in it to win or lose.",

 "skinGroupName": "Witch Feast/II",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 116,
 "content": "Witch Feast Role-Playing Script 'Horrorlair's Enigma' Custom Line/Fated Hero. The actor plays the role of the hero chosen by fate, who descends into the Horrorlair not just to quell disaster and eliminate evil, but with the hope of finding treasures to improve her life.",
 "dialog": "Witch Feast Role-Playing Script 'Horrorlair's Enigma' Custom Line/Fated Hero. The actor plays the role of the hero chosen by fate, who descends into the Horrorlair not just to quell disaster and eliminate evil, but with the hope of finding treasures to improve her life.",
 "usage": "One of Snowsant's costumes.",
 "description": "Once a pauper, now the world's greatest hope. That's what the script says anyway, but Snowsant just wants to get at the treasure chest Whislash brought!",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",

 "content": "Witch Feast Role-Playing Script 'The Curious Trove Manor' Custom Line/Trust Your Eyes. The actor plays the role of a Great Thief Magician, here for the treasure. No, come now—doubt those eyes of yours. Trust his hands.",
 "dialog": "Witch Feast Role-Playing Script 'The Curious Trove Manor' Custom Line/Trust Your Eyes. The actor plays the role of a Great Thief Magician, here for the treasure. No, come now—doubt those eyes of yours. Trust his hands.",
 "usage": "One of Lee's stage outfits.",
 "description": "Lee deftly handles his playing cards, corner of his mouth cocked in the same smile as ever. 'Winning a commitment from the underworld three times over in one card game? Ah, that's nonsense.'",

 "dialog": "Witch Feast Role-Playing Script 'The Curious Trove Manor' Custom Line/Like Illusion. The actor plays the role of the maid who guards the treasure. In a sea of roaming shadows of a hundred and one forms, all truest true and falsest false, the willful intruder finds himself endlessly dithering about the stairs.",

 "content": "Cambrian 1099 New Winter Collection/Melodic Portrayal. Stylishly loose-fitting, comfortable and mobile. The waterproof surface keeps it from being stained by paint, making it the ideal outfit for artists.",
 "dialog": "Cambrian 1099 New Winter Collection/Melodic Portrayal. Stylishly loose-fitting, comfortable and mobile. The waterproof surface keeps it from being stained by paint, making it the ideal outfit for artists.",
 "usage": "One of Deepcolor's casual outfits.",

 "content": "Cambrian 1100 Winter New Arrivals/Warm Velvet At the Corner. A warm coat, both thick and lightweight, winter boots for icy, snow-laden roads, and a white knit cap complete with a bright bow. Proof you don't have to sacrifice warmth for cuteness.",
 "dialog": "Cambrian 1100 Winter New Arrivals/Warm Velvet At the Corner. A warm coat, both thick and lightweight, winter boots for icy, snow-laden roads, and a white knit cap complete with a bright bow. Proof you don't have to sacrifice warmth for cuteness.",
 "usage": "One of Warmy's casual outfits.",
 "description": "Warmy trudges onwards and onwards, all so she can have the best bread in the neighborhood, though she ends up lost. Falling snow flutters through the night sky, and the scent of the bread in her hand cutting through the chilly air proves irresistible. Forget it, let's sit down and eat it while it's hot!",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 233,
 "displayTagId": null,
 "getTime": 1745514000,
 "onYear": 5,

 }

 "content": "Cambrian 1100 Winter New Arrivals/Travel Freely. A red and white baseball jacket over a black hoodie, paired with drawstring pants and sports shoes. Comfy and casual, unrestrictive and lightweight, suited for day-to-day travel.",
 "dialog": "Cambrian 1100 Winter New Arrivals/Travel Freely. A red and white baseball jacket over a black hoodie, paired with drawstring pants and sports shoes. Comfy and casual, unrestrictive and lightweight, suited for day-to-day travel.",
 "usage": "One of Sussurro's casual outfits.",
 "description": "The palm tree sticker was given to her by a surf shop owner during her last trip to Siesta, and the Lupo sticker is from her trip before that to Columbia, where an arcade manager awarded it for a new high score. Both adorn her suitcase. Who knows what she can get on her next trip?",

 "content": "Erato's home attire/Untold Stories. Soft, tight-fitting fabric with a thick and comfy scarf; comfortable attire for relaxing at home.",

 "skinGroupId": "2022#xmas",
 "skinGroupName": "Icefield Messenger/IV",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 128,
 "content": "Greyy festival costume/Aftershow. Finely-crafted costumes and props made by the Operators are very popular amongst the Rhodes Island audience.",
 "dialog": "Greyy festival costume/Aftershow. Finely-crafted costumes and props made by the Operators are very popular amongst the Rhodes Island audience.",
 "usage": "One of Greyy the Lightningbearer's casual outfits.",
 "description": "At the 1st-anniversary performance commemorating the premiere of the Rhodes Island-version of The Nutcracker, Greyy takes the stage again amidst the cheers of the crowd, closing the curtains on today's show along with the 'musicians' on stage.",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",

 "content": "Pudding's winter attire for going out/Gleaming Fey. The snowflake-embroidered gauze lining mitigates the heaviness of the jacket, giving it a light, pretty touch.",
 "dialog": "Pudding's winter attire for going out/Gleaming Fey. The snowflake-embroidered gauze lining mitigates the heaviness of the jacket, giving it a light, pretty touch.",
 "usage": "One of Pudding's casual outfits.",
 "description": "Pudding is responsible for emergency power maintenance today. Overtime pay is always appreciated—all the better when nothing happens—allowing her to wait under the tree and hand out gifts to passing children.",

 "dialog": "Tsukinogi's formal dress for festive occasions/Dance. The flimsy red skirt and sturdy white shawl are like flowing fire and burning snow. Shall we dance?",
 "usage": "One of Tsukinogi's casual outfits.",

 "skinGroupName": "Icefield Messenger/VI",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 129,
 "content": "Formal wear that Qanipalaat got on holiday/Gratitude Gift. Always one to gift Sami specialties, he's now received a gift in return. He smiled to learn that Victorian garb went well with his tail.",
 "dialog": "Formal wear that Qanipalaat received while on holiday/Gratitude Gift. Always one to gift Sami specialties, he's now received a gift in return. He smiled to learn that Victorian garb went well with his tail.",
 "usage": "One of Qanipalaat's casual outfits.",
 "description": "The specialties Qanipalaat hands out are often eccentric. Other operators may not be able to appreciate the terrifying dried totems or the pungent fermented food, but they recognize a gesture of friendship from an ancient civilization.",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",

 "content": "Harold's home attire/Inviting Snow. A burdenbeast neck pillow, burdenbeast pajamas, burdenbeast slippers. A full burdenbeast ensemble, very popular in Kjerag right now!",
 "dialog": "Harold's home attire/Inviting Snow. A burdenbeast neck pillow, burdenbeast pajamas, burdenbeast slippers. A full burdenbeast ensemble, very popular in Kjerag right now!",
 "usage": "One of Harold's casual outfits.",
 "description": "In times like these, when ice and snow rage outside the window, you should get a cup of hot cocoa, write love-filled letters to your wife and daughter, and throw in a comment on how cute the souvenir pajamas you gave them are. In short, he is rather pleased with himself.",

 "content": "Vitafield \[Camper\] Series Classics/Snowy Plains in Words. The layered fabric keeps the wearer warm, while the closed sleeves and pants keep the wind and snow out.",
 "dialog": "Vitafield \[Camper\] Series Classics/Snowy Plains in Words. The layered fabric keeps the wearer warm, while the closed sleeves and pants keep the wind and snow out.",
 "usage": "One of Pozëmka's casual outfits.",
 "description": "As line after line appears on the page, Pozëmka's thoughts drift to the night of her flight. The north wind brings the snow, while a bright fire burns in the fireplace. The gas lamp outside the tent flickers, unable to light her unpredictable path.",

 "skinGroupId": "2022#boc",
 "skinGroupName": "Bloodline of Combat/IV",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 148,
 "content": "Bloodline of Combat Collection/Polar Catcher. The nations of Terra collectively sent a dozen or so survey groups to scale Sami's perilous peaks. Only Team Aurora funded by Karlan Trade Co. ultimately scaled the summits without hassle, planting their flags and beacons at the peaks.",
 "dialog": "Bloodline of Combat Collection/Polar Catcher. The nations of Terra collectively sent a dozen or so survey groups to scale Sami's perilous peaks. Only Team Aurora funded by Karlan Trade Co. ultimately scaled the summits without hassle, planting their flags and beacons at the peaks.",
 "usage": "One of Aurora's outfits for crucial moments.",
 "description": "'Hi, are you there? Can you hear me, Maggy? This is Aurora! I made it to the summit!'",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 279,
 "displayTagId": null,
 "getTime": 1667487600,

 "designerList": null,
 "skinGroupId": "2022#boc",
 "skinGroupName": "Bloodline of Combat/IV",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 148,
 "content": "Bloodline of Combat Collection/Shore Rescue Modification. Lancet-2 was unexpectedly shot down into the water while aiding Ægir refugees off the coast of Iberia, and remained afloat for three months until located and retrieved by a Rhodes Island search and rescue team.",
 "dialog": "Bloodline of Combat Collection/Shore Rescue Modification. Lancet-2 was unexpectedly shot down into the water while aiding Ægir refugees off the coast of Iberia, and remained afloat for three months until located and retrieved by a Rhodes Island search and rescue team.",
 "usage": "One of Lancet-2's modifications for crucial moments.",
 "description": "'I couldn't perform any tasks while I was afloat, so the only thing I could do was compute something interesting. According to my calculations over these last three months, the logic of space and time takes the form of the lovely Ms. Closure.'",
 "obtainApproach": "Event Reward",
 "sortId": 280,
 "displayTagId": "Event Reward",
 "getTime": 1667487600,
 "onYear": 2,
 "onPeriod": 17
 }
 },

 "content": "Bloodline of Combat Collection/Breaking the Ice. Operator Frostleaf's attire during her special appointment by the Rhodes Island Columbia branch to conduct a search and rescue in the nation's north. Life has bestowed her the resolve to return to the battlefield.",
 "dialog": "Bloodline of Combat Collection/Breaking the Ice. Operator Frostleaf's attire during her special appointment by the Rhodes Island Columbia branch to conduct a search and rescue in the nation's north. Life has bestowed her the resolve to return to the battlefield.",

 "content": "Bloodline of Combat Collection/Return. Ægir Consul Gladiia's attire as she led her unit to return to the sea. Following sufficient exchange with the nations of dry land, the Ægir found themselves fully prepared to return to the home they'd left.",
 "dialog": "Bloodline of Combat Collection/Return. Ægir Consul Gladiia's attire as she led her unit to return to the sea. Following sufficient exchange with the nations of dry land, the Ægir found themselves fully prepared to return to the home they'd left.",

 "skinGroupId": "2023#boc",
 "skinGroupName": "Bloodline of Combat/VI",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 150,
 "content": "Bloodline of Combat Collection/Remnant. Originium has taken over the land, and what she envisioned has become a reality. She has enumerated and entrusted everything else to the others, leaving only her name as she hones her mission into a sharp blade.",
 "dialog": "Bloodline of Combat Collection/Remnant. Originium has taken over the land, and what she envisioned has become a reality. She has enumerated and entrusted everything else to the others, leaving only her name as she hones her mission into a sharp blade.",
 "usage": "One of Kal'tsit's outfits for crucial moments.",
 "description": "'I'm Kal'tsit, a doctor of Rhodes Island, and also the companion of Amiya and the Doctor. You have long been worthless to me.'",
