 "designerList": null,
 "skinGroupId": "2023#boc",
 "skinGroupName": "Bloodline of Combat/VI",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 150,
 "content": "Bloodline of Combat Collection/Born as One. An engraving leaves a shadow, like two sides of a coin, or the cycle of day and night. When both are aware of their dual nature, Laurentina possesses a soul most complete, like unto the twin moons.",
 "dialog": "Bloodline of Combat Collection/Born as One. An engraving leaves a shadow, like two sides of a coin, or the cycle of day and night. When both are aware of their dual nature, Laurentina possesses a soul most complete, like unto the twin moons.",
 "usage": "One of Specter the Unchained's outfits for crucial moments.",
 "description": "'Step aside. The silence and blood won't bother me one bit, and I need to get the others back to the ball ASAP.'",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 284,
 "displayTagId": null,
 "getTime": 1699376400,

 }

 "designerList": null,
 "skinGroupId": "2023#boc",
 "skinGroupName": "Bloodline of Combat/VI",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 150,
 "content": "Bloodline of Combat Collection/Ten Thousand Mountains. Ch'en Hui-chieh entered the capital on a starry night, and left before sunrise after settling matters. She bid farewell to old friends and took a sampan down the river, the lamp on the prow crashing through the fog and night.",
 "dialog": "Bloodline of Combat Collection/Ten Thousand Mountains. Ch'en Hui-chieh entered the capital on a starry night, and left before sunrise after settling matters. She bid farewell to old friends and took a sampan down the river, the lamp on the prow crashing through the fog and night.",
 "usage": "One of Ch'en the Holungday's outfits for crucial moments.",
 "description": "'My thanks to you two Tianshi for accompanying me on my journey so far, but it's about time we went our separate ways.'",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 285,

 "getTime": 1699376400,

 }

 "skinGroupId": "2023#boc",
 "skinGroupName": "Bloodline of Combat/VI",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 150,
 "content": "Bloodline of Combat Collection/Eine Variation. A traditional-style gown worn by every Graf Urtica, now draped over Ebenholz's shoulders. Orders apathetically seep from the tip of the staff, piercing through the sparse ensemble of nobles.",
 "dialog": "Bloodline of Combat Collection/Eine Variation. A traditional-style gown worn by every Graf Urtica, now draped over Ebenholz's shoulders. Orders apathetically seep from the tip of the staff, piercing through the sparse ensemble of nobles.",
 "usage": "One of Ebenholz's outfits for crucial moments.",
 "description": "'My duty, my obligation, the shame of my nobility, and the golden cage that I oh so hate... this is my path.'",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 286,
 "displayTagId": null,
 "getTime": 1699376400,

 "designerList": null,
 "skinGroupId": "2023#boc",
 "skinGroupName": "Bloodline of Combat/VI",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 150,
 "content": "Bloodline of Combat Collection/Twines of Time. Orchid finally completed her design after several torturous nights. She stroked the delicate stitches on it, quietly praying for life.",
 "dialog": "Bloodline of Combat Collection/Twines of Time. Orchid finally completed her design after several torturous nights. She stroked the delicate stitches on it, quietly praying for life.",
 "usage": "One of Orchid's outfits for crucial moments.",
 "description": "'I didn't understand back then... I gave them form, but could not manage warmth or life. But now I do, which is why they're always a beautiful shade of pure white, while I'm always draped in black.'",
 "obtainApproach": "Event Reward",
 "sortId": 287,
 "displayTagId": "Event Reward",
 "getTime": 1699700400,
 "onYear": 3,
 "onPeriod": 17
 }
 },

 "designerList": null,
 "skinGroupId": "2023#boc#2",
 "skinGroupName": "Bloodline of Combat/VII",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 151,
 "content": "Bloodline of Combat Collection/Tournament Fantasy Retrofit Kit. The General Chamber of Commerce had no idea the newest wave of protests would arise from a most unremarkable robot's tournament retrofit labelled as a 'drone.'",
 "dialog": "Bloodline of Combat Collection/Tournament Fantasy Retrofit Kit. The General Chamber of Commerce had no idea the newest wave of protests would arise from a most unremarkable robot's tournament retrofit labelled as a 'drone.'",
 "usage": "One of Justice Knight's modifications for crucial moments.",
 "description": "'I dreamed of a knight. They were a carefree and cheerful sort, having traveled all over the land and gathered an array of talents. They saved countless enslaved robots and Infected, and in that dream... that knight was me.'",
 "obtainApproach": "Event Reward",
 "sortId": 288,
 "displayTagId": "Event Reward",
 "getTime": 1701795600,
 "onYear": 3,
 "onPeriod": 19
 }
 },

 "skinGroupId": "2024#boc",
 "skinGroupName": "Bloodline of Combat/VIII",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 152,
 "content": "Bloodline of Combat Collection/Young Branch. Water melts glacier on its way back to the soil, while wandering leaves revisit the woods. Her origins in eternal sleep, her answers long departed. But where are they now?",
 "dialog": "Bloodline of Combat Collection/Young Branch. Water melts glacier on its way back to the soil, while wandering leaves revisit the woods. Her origins in eternal sleep, her answers long departed. But where are they now?",
 "usage": "One of Muelsyse's outfits for crucial moments.",
 "description": "'But It has still left some memories behind for us. Are they mementos, or lamentations? I don't know...'",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 289,

 "skinGroupName": "Bloodline of Combat/VIII",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 152,
 "content": "Bloodline of Combat Collection/Under the Flaming Dome. As artillery splits the heavens, all is as it ever was. Ines arrives at the city, ready to rewrite Kazdel's once inevitable ending of destruction.",
 "dialog": "Bloodline of Combat Collection/Under the Flaming Dome. As artillery splits the heavens, all is as it ever was. Ines arrives at the city, ready to rewrite Kazdel's once inevitable ending of destruction.",
 "usage": "One of Ines's outfits for crucial moments.",
 "description": "The demon who manipulates shadow reveals herself amongst the drifting embers, inscribing fear above the wailing plains.",

 "skinGroupId": "2024#boc",
 "skinGroupName": "Bloodline of Combat/VIII",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 152,
 "content": "Bloodline of Combat Collection/Blade-cleaved Tides. Thorns bares his blade, and Iberia's fleet sets sail after a century of silence. A golden secret has emerged in lawless lands, and seas of sand and salt can no longer conceal its radiance.",
 "dialog": "Bloodline of Combat Collection/Blade-cleaved Tides. Thorns bares his blade, and Iberia's fleet sets sail after a century of silence. A golden secret has emerged in lawless lands, and seas of sand and salt can no longer conceal its radiance.",
 "usage": "One of Thorns's outfits for crucial moments.",
 "description": "'Once more has the tide returned to Iberia, and it follows the point of my sword. Do you hear the command of the waves as they crash upon the shore? They call upon Iberia to set sail once more.'",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 291,
 "displayTagId": null,
 "getTime": 1730394000,
 "onYear": 4,
 "onPeriod": 14
 }
 },

 "skinGroupName": "Bloodline of Combat/VIII",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 152,
 "content": "Bloodline of Combat Collection/300 Metres Underground. Savage raises her lantern, her suit billowing in the abyss. Deeper in the darkness, graviton accelerators link in a loop, twinkling in unison. They have noticed her arrival.",
 "dialog": "Bloodline of Combat Collection/300 Metres Underground. Savage raises her lantern, her suit billowing in the abyss. Deeper in the darkness, graviton accelerators link in a loop, twinkling in unison. They have noticed her arrival.",
 "usage": "One of Savage's outfits for crucial moments.",
 "description": "'Team, get in contact with Amiya and the Doctor—I've found it! We've finally found it!'",

 "skinGroupId": "2025#boc",
 "skinGroupName": "Bloodline of Combat/IX",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 153,
 "content": "Bloodline of Combat Collection/Judgment Day. Gun-Knight Fiammetta returns to where her squad fell apart. Fragments of time have turned into vicious beasts, intent on bringing everything in the area into stasis. Without the slightest hesitation, she pulls the trigger.",
 "dialog": "Bloodline of Combat Collection/Judgment Day. Gun-Knight Fiammetta returns to where her squad fell apart. Fragments of time have turned into vicious beasts, intent on bringing everything in the area into stasis. Without the slightest hesitation, she pulls the trigger.",
 "usage": "One of Fiammetta's outfits for crucial moments.",
 "description": "'There's still the Holy City and Kazdel left... You really give me the worst headaches, Mostima. Once I find you, I'm going to punch you in the face.'",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 293,
 "displayTagId": null,

 }

 "content": "Bloodline of Combat Collection/Primordial Ode. PhonoR-0 is draped in the lace veil her sisters embroidered with incantations, singing an ode above the Valley. The Banshees have finally found their voice once more.",
 "dialog": "Bloodline of Combat Collection/Primordial Ode. PhonoR-0 is draped in the lace veil her sisters embroidered with incantations, singing an ode above the Valley. The Banshees have finally found their voice once more.",
 "usage": "One of PhonoR-0's modifications for crucial moments.",

 "content": "Bloodline of Combat Collection/Stronghold. An outfit worn by Saria during the confrontation between the General Jurisdiction and the Research Branch. Though her surroundings crumbled under the onslaught of Arts colliding, her conviction never wavered, like the land itself.",

 "content": "Bloodline of Combat Collection/Dreadnaught. The attire worn by the elite operator, Beagle, when serving as rearguard during the Great March of Bolívar. This is her final test.",

 "skinGroupName": "Bloodline of Combat/III",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 147,
 "content": "Bloodline of Combat Collection/Dark Cloud. Mountain's attire at his parents' funeral. Though he personally slew his own enemy, there is no hint of joy in his heart. There are still things he needs to do.",
 "dialog": "Bloodline of Combat Collection/Dark Cloud. Mountain's attire at his parents' funeral. Though he personally slew his own enemy, there is no hint of joy in his heart. There are still things he needs to do.",
 "usage": "One of Mountain's outfits for crucial moments.",
 "description": "'I apply to withdraw from Rhodes Island. You've helped me plenty enough, and I will not implicate you all in what I am to do next.'",

 "dialog": "Bloodline of Combat Collection/Forgemaster. Rhodes Island Engineering Chief Eunectes's outfit while refitting an experimental-model Raging Ironhide. Every point worked on all by herself, everyone saying she's much more reliable than Closure. Closure fiercely rolling her eyes.",

 "content": "Bloodline of Combat Collection/Tested One. Ayerscarpe's attire while upgrading the Rim Billiton Weapon Distribution Center weapons system. He needs to infiltrate a Catastrophe area together with his friends, and heist an important piece of data back before the Columbians.",
 "dialog": "Bloodline of Combat Collection/Tested One. Ayerscarpe's attire while upgrading the Rim Billiton Weapon Distribution Center weapons system. He needs to infiltrate a Catastrophe area together with his friends, and heist an important piece of data back before the Columbians.",
 "usage": "One of Ayerscarpe's outfits for crucial moments.",
 "description": "'And Leon's armed like a weaponized tin can now. Fine, at least we all know what we're doing.'",

 "skinGroupName": "Bloodline of Combat/III",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 147,
 "content": "Bloodline of Combat Collection/Gorgeous Flower. Flint's attire when she set out on a lone journey, a 'Catastrophe Messenger' by her own declaration. Before, her fists only knew Acahualla and Rhodes Island. Now, it's Terra's turn.",
 "dialog": "Bloodline of Combat Collection/Gorgeous Flower. Flint's attire when she set out on a lone journey, a 'Catastrophe Messenger' by her own declaration. Before, her fists only knew Acahualla and Rhodes Island. Now, it's Terra's turn.",
 "usage": "One of Flint's outfits for crucial moments.",
 "description": "'Been learning for so long. Now I can finally go take on all those strong guys. Yeah, relax. I'll be a little civilized about it.'",

 "content": "Bloodline of Combat Collection/Professional. The outfit Spot wore for an Annihilation mission promo. It might've been effective, but all Spot's thinking about is what cartoons are on tonight.",
 "dialog": "Bloodline of Combat Collection/Professional. The outfit Spot wore for an Annihilation mission promo. It might've been effective, but all Spot's thinking about is what cartoons are on tonight.",
 "usage": "One of Spot's outfits for what might be pretty crucial moments.",
 "description": "'We done shooting yet? No? Listen, director lady, I don't wanna get you rated for obscenities, but can you not waste my precious freaking time along with yours?'",

 "content": "Rhodes Kitchen Collection/Shaved-Ice Memories. The work outfit worn by Magallan to make shaved ice during the food festival combines traditions of Higashi with characteristics of Rhine Labs. Breathable, well-insulated, and easy to move in, this outfit allows Magallan to fully devote herself to her work, even if in a shaved-ice shop.",
 "dialog": "Rhodes Kitchen Collection/Shaved-Ice Memories. The work outfit worn by Magallan to make shaved ice during the food festival combines traditions of Higashi with characteristics of Rhine Labs. Breathable, well-insulated, and easy to move in, this outfit allows Magallan to fully devote herself to her work, even if in a shaved-ice shop.",
 "usage": "One of Magallan's casual outfits.",
 "description": "After replacing manual labor with technology, Magallan discovered a new side to frosty confection-making.",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 314,
 "displayTagId": null,
 "getTime": 1601402400,
 "onYear": 0,
 "onPeriod": 11
 }

 "dialog": "Rhodes Kitchen Collection/Bibliosmia. After being re-coordinated to reflect the national outfits of the people of Ursus, Istina wore this outfit to promote traditional cuisine at the food festival.  "usage": "One of Istina's casual outfits.",
 "description": "The most fun in life is had in books and through food.",

 "skinGroupSortIndex": 155,
 "content": "Rhodes Kitchen Collection/Honey Pilferer. Beehunter's sleepwear. Fluffy, soft, comfortable, tight-fitting, and easy to wash, this outfit is suitable for both home use and as sleepwear. What nobody expected is that Beehunter would head straight to the food festival.",
 "dialog": "Rhodes Kitchen Collection/Honey Pilferer. Beehunter's sleepwear. Fluffy, soft, comfortable, tight-fitting, and easy to wash, this outfit is suitable for both home use and as sleepwear. What nobody expected is that Beehunter would head straight to the food festival.",
 "usage": "One of Beehunter's casual outfits.",
 "description": "These fresh, luscious berries are already driving people crazy. What if you dipped them in a touch of thick honey... Wait, did you see that Ursus girl just now?",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 316,
 "displayTagId": null,
 "getTime": 1601402400,
 "onYear": 0,
 "onPeriod": 11
 }
 },

 "dialog": "Rhodes Kitchen Collection/Sweet Jackpot. You can't win the sweets competition by wearing a uniform! Insider put this on before diving head-first into the bakery, and he's about to present his creation. Don't worry, the sweetness has been adjusted to suit your tastes.",

 "content": "Rhodes Kitchen Collection/Secret Family Recipe. Savage wore this when making carrot cakes. The hand-knitted sleeves and an apron paired with a cool, breathable inner layer make it feel relaxing and distinctive.",
 "dialog": "Rhodes Kitchen Collection/Secret Family Recipe. Savage wore this when making carrot cakes. The hand-knitted sleeves and an apron paired with a cool, breathable inner layer make it feel relaxing and distinctive.",

 "skinGroupId": "2020#ghost",
 "skinGroupName": "Dreambind Castle",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 158,
 "content": "Clothes of Phantom's, the attire he sported while staffing the 'Dreambind Castle' event. The dance as cloth, the song as silk, the threading through emotion, the tailoring by fabrication, the weave of obliteration and howling madness, it all culminates in this majestic yet skin-crawling ensemble.",
 "dialog": "Clothes of Phantom's, the attire he sported while staffing the 'Dreambind Castle' event. The dance as cloth, the song as silk, the threading through emotion, the tailoring by fabrication, the weave of obliteration and howling madness, it all culminates in this majestic yet skin-crawling ensemble.",
 "usage": "One of Phantom's staff-member costumes.",
 "description": "'Pristine dreamscapes twine over the tangible in symbiosis, their fear and dread a permeation just begun. You outsiders, honored to take them on, are the first to do so—that live.'",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 319,
 "displayTagId": null,
 "getTime": 1617915600,
 "onYear": 1,
 "onPeriod": 4
 }
 },

 "content": "Whistlewind Series Race Queen Core Line/Queen, No.1. In full race queen form, sporting a Raythean-sponsored Piledriver Spear, Bagpipe carries herself tall and brings the spectators' cheers non-stop.",
 "dialog": "Whistlewind Series Race Queen Core Line/Queen, No.1. In full race queen form, sporting a Raythean-sponsored Piledriver Spear, Bagpipe carries herself tall and brings the spectators' cheers non-stop.",

 "content": "Ambience Synesthesia Tailor-Provided/Burst Feline. Stage clothing picked by drummer Blaze herself. There might not be much material, but it's breathable, sweat-absorbent and flame-resistant, ensuring no outfit malfunctions will affect Blaze's performance.",
 "dialog": "Ambience Synesthesia Tailor-Provided/Burst Feline. Stage clothing picked by drummer Blaze herself. There might not be much material, but it's breathable, sweat-absorbent and flame-resistant, ensuring no outfit malfunctions will affect Blaze's performance.",

 "skinGroupName": "Ambience Synesthesia/II",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 169,
 "content": "Ambience Synesthesia Tailor-Provided/Obsidian. Mudrock's work outfit. Mudrock made rounds between every facility at the venue, ensuring the performance would go without a hitch. Though working behind the scenes, she nevertheless opted for a disguise of sorts so as not to disturb the audience.",
 "dialog": "Ambience Synesthesia Tailor-Provided/Obsidian. Mudrock's work outfit. Mudrock made rounds between every facility at the venue, ensuring the performance would go without a hitch. Though working behind the scenes, she nevertheless opted for a disguise of sorts so as not to disturb the audience.",
 "usage": "One of Mudrock's work outfits.",
 "description": "Most hotheaded troublemakers back off for their own safety, seeing the iron hammer she's carrying.",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 338,
 "displayTagId": null,
 "getTime": 1667487600,
 "onYear": 2,
 "onPeriod": 17
 }

 "dialog": "Ambience Synesthesia Tailor-Provided/Cardwinner. Tequila's formal stage outfit. Qualified hosts heat up the audience; excellent hosts strive to eliminate any errant possibility.",

 "skinGroupName": "Ambience Synesthesia/II",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 169,
 "content": "Ambience Synesthesia Tailor-Provided/Emerald Holiday. Reed's plain outfit during downtime. Lyrics have limits, and manuscripts have deadlines, but all that's still far, far away. They're no worry; in the comfort of the afternoon sun, finishing your glass of juice comes first.",
 "dialog": "Ambience Synesthesia Tailor-Provided/Emerald Holiday. Reed's plain outfit during downtime. Lyrics have limits, and manuscripts have deadlines, but all that's still far, far away. They're no worry; in the comfort of the afternoon sun, finishing your glass of juice comes first.",
 "usage": "One of Reed's performance outfits.",
 "description": "Words scatter into the air, sticking by the leaves and landing in her glass. After Reed gathers them all up, only then can she put them together throughout the days and the nights.",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 340,

 "skinGroupName": "Ambience Synesthesia/III",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 170,
 "content": "Ambience Synesthesia Tailor-Provided/Golden Dream. Lumen's casual leisure wear, tailored for elegance from lightweight materials. The sea mist has lifted, and you can now see the lighthouse without binoculars.",
 "dialog": "Ambience Synesthesia Tailor-Provided/Golden Dream. Lumen's casual leisure wear, tailored for elegance from lightweight materials. The sea mist has lifted, and you can now see the lighthouse without binoculars.",
 "usage": "One of Lumen's work outfits.",
 "description": "The golden sunlight is not the only visitor to this room. The ocean has just revealed itself, and Lumen gestures at you to speak softly so as to not disturb the dreamlike scene.",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",

 "content": "Ambience Synesthesia Tailor-Provided/Voyage of Feathers. Irene's work outfit. Placed in charge of the props, she sets them in place, as a flock of fowlbeasts circles higher into the sky, ships sailing into the distant horizon.",
 "dialog": "Ambience Synesthesia Tailor-Provided/Voyage of Feathers. Irene's work outfit. Placed in charge of the props, she sets them in place, as a flock of fowlbeasts circles higher into the sky, ships sailing into the distant horizon.",
 "usage": "One of Irene's work outfits.",
 "description": "During her spare time while setting up, Irene lifts the hem of her skirt, and looks at the fowlbeasts soaring up high. A hint of eagerness shows on her face as she goes on stage and begins to dance, Iberian style.",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 342,

 }

 "skinGroupId": "2024#ambienceSynesthesia",
 "skinGroupName": "Ambience Synesthesia/IV",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 171,
 "content": "Ambience Synesthesia Tailor-Provided/Never-melting Ice. One of SilverAsh's suits, tailored for important events. The weight of the name of Silverash clan can tear rifts across Terra. Even majestic glaciers and roiling clouds make way for him.",
 "dialog": "Ambience Synesthesia Tailor-Provided/Never-melting Ice. One of SilverAsh's suits, tailored for important events. The weight of the name of Silverash clan can tear rifts across Terra. Even majestic glaciers and roiling clouds make way for him.",
 "usage": "One of Silverash's formalwear.",
 "description": "Enciodes rejected those insignificant, sycophantic invitations to cooperation. He believes Kjerag will eventually conquer the entire audience, but understands that now is not the time for the ice to melt.",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 344,

 "getTime": 1730394000,

 }
 },

 "LM7"\
 \],

 "skinGroupId": "2024#ambienceSynesthesia",
 "skinGroupName": "Ambience Synesthesia/IV",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 171,
 "content": "Ambience Synesthesia Tailor-Provided/Carriage of the Winds of Time. Ho'olheyak's concert outfit, evoking a classical yet romantic dance. She chose the fabrics with utmost care, wrinkled for her key performance, and gilded for the years everlasting.",
 "dialog": "Ambience Synesthesia Tailor-Provided/Carriage of the Winds of Time. Ho'olheyak's concert outfit, evoking a classical yet romantic dance. She chose the fabrics with utmost care, wrinkled for her key performance, and gilded for the years everlasting.",
 "usage": "One of Ho'olheyak's performance outfits.",
 "description": "The night wind blows away an ancient melody, and the stars leave behind an instant of mirth. In the end, all things must fade. But spare them no thought for now. Ho'olheyak steps down from the stage, reciting eternity at you.",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 345,
 "displayTagId": null,
 "getTime": 1730394000,
 "onYear": 4,
 "onPeriod": 14
 }
 },

 "skinGroupSortIndex": 171,
 "content": "Ambience Synesthesia Tailor-Provided/Rhythmic Blocks. Swire's chic and breezy concert outfit, showcasing all her vivacity and cuteness. She leads the choreography, gladly accepting the applauses and affection from her stans.",
 "dialog": "Ambience Synesthesia Tailor-Provided/Rhythmic Blocks. Swire's chic and breezy concert outfit, showcasing all her vivacity and cuteness. She leads the choreography, gladly accepting the applauses and affection from her stans.",
 "usage": "One of Swire the Elegant Wit's performance outfits.",
 "description": "To ensure the music video would go off without a hitch, Swire prepared as much as she could. Her group dances amidst the flickering lights, their voices carrying their song to the sky. She sets aside all titles and pretense, her only hope being that this will be an unforgettable performance.",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 346,
 "displayTagId": null,
 "getTime": 1730394000,
 "onYear": 4,
 "onPeriod": 14
 }
 },

 "skinGroupName": "Ambience Synesthesia/V",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 172,
 "content": "Ambience Synesthesia Tailor-Provided/Melodic Flutter. Clothes Ines wore when posing for a music-themed portrait. The magnificent dress is a perfect match for the music, as the butterflies dance to the melody, bringing the reverie to life in vivid detail.",
 "dialog": "Ambience Synesthesia Tailor-Provided/Melodic Flutter. Clothes Ines wore when posing for a music-themed portrait. The magnificent dress is a perfect match for the music, as the butterflies dance to the melody, bringing the reverie to life in vivid detail.",
 "usage": "One of Ines's formal outfits.",
 "description": "'That expression on Ines's face—that crisp, cool distance—is simply a perfect fit for the dreamy ambiance this shoot needs. Just how does she do it?' 'Hah, bet she's thinking up ways to kill you all later.'",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 347,
 "displayTagId": null,
 "getTime": 1758042000,
 "onYear": 5,

 }
 },

 "skinGroupId": "2025#ambienceSynesthesia",
 "skinGroupName": "Ambience Synesthesia/V",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 172,
 "content": "Ambience Synesthesia Tailor-Provided/Empty Crown. Outfit Stainless tailored for himself. With unique armor designs and bold weapon modifications, he has successfully recreated the image of a heroic knight in his heart.",
 "dialog": "Ambience Synesthesia Tailor-Provided/Empty Crown. Outfit Stainless tailored for himself. With unique armor designs and bold weapon modifications, he has successfully recreated the image of a heroic knight in his heart.",
 "usage": "One of Stainless's casual outfits.",
 "description": "Stainless hesitatingly told his granny that he made these clothes 'all in his own time' with 'scrap materials'. Catherine didn't scold him, though. All she said was that his craftsmanship was still a bit shoddy.",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 348,
 "displayTagId": null,
 "getTime": 1758042000,
 "onYear": 5,
 "onPeriod": 15
 }
 },

 "skinGroupId": "2025#ambienceSynesthesia#2",
 "skinGroupName": "Ambience Synesthesia/VI",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 173,
 "content": "Ambience Synesthesia Tailor-Provided/Golden Reverie. Dress carefully picked by Muelsyse. The top is bright and brazen, like the early dawnlight, and the skirt is soft and sable, like the moons playing across a still lake—a perfect union of luxury and solemnity.",
 "dialog": "Ambience Synesthesia Tailor-Provided/Golden Reverie. Dress carefully picked by Muelsyse. The top is bright and brazen, like the early dawnlight, and the skirt is soft and sable, like the moons playing across a still lake—a perfect union of luxury and solemnity.",
 "usage": "One of Muelsyse's formal outfits.",
 "description": "It is as if time stands still here. A golden hall, a golden dream—and in the time it takes you to think this, an elf walks out from under the archway, gracing you with a smile. At that instant, time resumes its flow.",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 349,
 "displayTagId": null,
 "getTime": 1758042000,
 "onYear": 5,
 "onPeriod": 15
 }
 },

 "skinGroupId": "2025#ambienceSynesthesia#2",
 "skinGroupName": "Ambience Synesthesia/VI",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 173,
 "content": "Ambience Synesthesia Tailor-Provided/Radiant Serenity. Clothes Logos wore as a guest at the Liches' spire. Golden moons and stars adorn a base of blue-gray fabric, graceful yet profound.",
 "dialog": "Ambience Synesthesia Tailor-Provided/Radiant Serenity. Clothes Logos wore as a guest at the Liches' spire. Golden moons and stars adorn a base of blue-gray fabric, graceful yet profound.",
 "usage": "One of Logos's formal outfits.",
 "description": "Pain, rage, sorrow, joy... Logos silently sits at the peak of the spire, allowing the music to wash over him, allowing the emotions to envelop him. Finally, he picks up his pen, a composition rising from his heart.",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 350,
 "displayTagId": null,

 "onYear": 5,

 }

 "skinGroupName": "Ambience Synesthesia/VI",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 173,
 "content": "Ambience Synesthesia Tailor-Provided/Ethereal Harmony. Stage clothing picked by conductor Mostima herself. A mysterious blue serves as the main hue, a blue of grace and beauty, a fitting accompaniment to the stage she built.",
 "dialog": "Ambience Synesthesia Tailor-Provided/Ethereal Harmony. Stage clothing picked by conductor Mostima herself. A mysterious blue serves as the main hue, a blue of grace and beauty, a fitting accompaniment to the stage she built.",
 "usage": "One of Mostima's performance outfits.",
 "description": "'Close your eyes. Imagine you have arrived at the end of time. There is nobody there. Only the sun, the moons, and the instruments. Then, you hear music, and you cannot help but open your eyes. Welcome to the concert, just for you.'",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",

 "skinGroupSortIndex": 163,
 "content": "The Legend of Luo Xiaohei Collaborative Series/Spring Praise. Rustic apparel commonly seen in Terra's central regions. Simple and easygoing, hardy against wear and dirt. Best suited to journeys, outings, and other such daily activities.",
 "dialog": "The Legend of Luo Xiaohei Collaborative Series/Spring Praise. Rustic apparel commonly seen in Terra's central regions. Simple and easygoing, hardy against wear and dirt. Best suited to journeys, outings, and other such daily activities.",
 "usage": "One of Suzuran's casual outfits.",
 "description": "Sunlight filters through the leaves, and she meanders about the trees with her newfound friend, her smile as beautiful and bright as a flower.",

 "skinGroupName": "The Legend of Luo Xiaohei",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 163,
 "content": "The Legend of Luo Xiaohei Collaborative Series/Before Singing. Glossy texturing and a bright palette make for materials that shout energy, while contour-hugging innerwear pairs with a loose-fit jacket to provide both comfort and chic.",
 "dialog": "The Legend of Luo Xiaohei Collaborative Series/Before Singing. Glossy texturing and a bright palette make for materials that shout energy, while contour-hugging innerwear pairs with a loose-fit jacket to provide both comfort and chic.",
 "usage": "One of Rockrock's casual outfits.",
 "description": "Rockrock's endlessly enthused about picking out a present for her new friend, but when the next welcoming activity is—singing twelve straight songs with Xiaohei? That's got her a little awkward.",

 "content": "Monster Hunter Collaborative Series/Fly Into the Street. The Felynes are amped with excitement for getting some Terra-style fresh fits on, and spray paint-filled cans especially pique their curiosity. Noir Corne senses something big and bad's about to go down.",
 "dialog": "Monster Hunter Collaborative Series/Fly Into the Street. The Felynes are amped with excitement for getting some Terra-style fresh fits on, and spray paint-filled cans especially pique their curiosity. Noir Corne senses something big and bad's about to go down.",
 "usage": "Attire gifted to the Felynes after arriving on Rhodes Island.",
 "description": "'Just a quick spray here, here, aaand here. Purrfect! Yes, my graffiti's quite remeowkable, if I say so myself! Quick, snap a picture of us together!'",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",

 "skinGroupName": "Sanrio Characters",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 191,
 "content": "Brand Collaborative Series/Remedy In A Cup Of Leung Cha. Hard to imagine, but the oft-lazing-about Lee is happily wearing an apron while minding the leung cha store below the office. A hobby of his?",
 "dialog": "Brand Collaborative Series/Remedy In A Cup Of Leung Cha. Hard to imagine, but the oft-lazing-about Lee is happily wearing an apron while minding the leung cha store below the office. A hobby of his?",
 "usage": "One of Lee's casual outfits.",
 "description": "A leung cha store is not just for leung cha, and the office is not just for work. As Lee would say, this is where you'll find the human touch in Lungmen. After all, no matter if someone's here for leung cha or a detective, what they're really looking for is peace of mind.",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 358,

 "content": "Brand Collaborative Series/Party In The Garden. The sweetest treats, the most vibrant flowers, and lots and lots and lots of bow-tie ribbons. Even after the fire, Goldenglow has never forgotten that dream.",
 "dialog": "Brand Collaborative Series/Party In The Garden. The sweetest treats, the most vibrant flowers, and lots and lots and lots of bow-tie ribbons. Even after the fire, Goldenglow has never forgotten that dream.",
 "usage": "One of Goldenglow's casual outfits.",
 "description": "From baking cakes to putting up decorations, Goldenglow helped set up this tea party with her friends. There's no special occasion or meaning behind it. Just a gentle, quiet afternoon she should have had.",

 "skinGroupName": "Sanrio Characters",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 191,
 "content": "Brand Collaborative Series/Stream Above The Clouds. She wakes up atop a cloud in her favorite childhood dress, surrounded by all her friends, and through her daze senses a freedom she hasn't felt in a long time—wait, why's she streaming with her phone?!",
 "dialog": "Brand Collaborative Series/Stream Above The Clouds. She wakes up atop a cloud in her favorite childhood dress, surrounded by all her friends, and through her daze senses a freedom she hasn't felt in a long time—wait, why's she streaming with her phone?!",
 "usage": "One of U-Official's casual outfits.",
 "description": "'All my friends watching out there, this is your favorite Streamer U! Look! Check out where I'm coming at you live from! What do you think? This must be that 'cloud streaming' everyone's been talking about lately!'",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 360,
 "displayTagId": "From collabs",
 "getTime": 1734714000,
 "onYear": 4,
 "onPeriod": 18
 }

 "skinGroupSortIndex": 176,
 "content": "Monster Siren Records Idol Project 'Shining Steps' Promotional Costume/Top Tier Live. Always with a shining smile, a gentlemanly attitude, and impressive skills. Only just on stage, and Tequila's already mesmerized the crowd.",
 "dialog": "Monster Siren Records Idol Project 'Shining Steps' Promotional Costume/Top Tier Live. Always with a shining smile, a gentlemanly attitude, and impressive skills. Only just on stage, and Tequila's already mesmerized the crowd.",
 "usage": "One of Tequila's performance outfits.",
 "description": "Though it was his first audition, Tequila's score shot far past the competition. The other idol wannabes wanted to ask how to be as charming as him, but within minutes found themselves won over by his smile and joining his fan club.",

 "dialog": "Achievement Star Collection/Trendsetting Player. A gift from the devs, thrown in when Kirara bought a complete set of gaming equipment. Customized just for her, a loose and comfortable outfit for around the home.",

 "skinGroupSortIndex": 179,
 "content": "Achievement Star Collection/The Archivist and Her Pilgrimage. Clothes Leizi wore at a game expo. She plays a mysterious wandering scholar with a magical companion. Her dedication was praiseworthy, and she brought a true ending to the story.",
 "dialog": "Achievement Star Collection/The Archivist and Her Pilgrimage. Clothes Leizi wore at a game expo. She plays a mysterious wandering scholar with a magical companion. Her dedication was praiseworthy, and she brought a true ending to the story.",
 "usage": "One of Leizi's stage outfits.",
 "description": "When 'Destiny Quest' launched, the wandering scholar watched over the ruins, welcoming the hero to the start of their rough-and-tumble journey. Leizi doubted her motives, broke down her words, searched all over for her secrets, before finally unlocking the hidden level after the end of the game.",

 "skinGroupId": "2024#game",
 "skinGroupName": "Achievement Star/III",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 179,
 "content": "Achievement Star Collection/The Adjudicatrix and Her Resolve. A 'Destiny Quest' outfit made for Irene by the devs based on her role in the game. To promote the next update, she's forced to stand on the stage for a photo op.",
 "dialog": "Achievement Star Collection/The Adjudicatrix and Her Resolve. A 'Destiny Quest' outfit made for Irene by the devs based on her role in the game. To promote the next update, she's forced to stand on the stage for a photo op.",
 "usage": "One of Irene's stage outfits.",
 "description": "As one of her off-hour pastimes, Irene is very interested in how her choices in the game will affect the narrative. Recently, her plethora of notes has gone viral without her meaning to. The developers agreed to change her username—if she agreed to show her sincerity.",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 371,
 "displayTagId": null,
 "getTime": 1741626000,

 "onPeriod": 3
 }
 },

 "skinGroupName": "Achievement Star/III",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 179,
 "content": "Achievement Star Collection/The Apprentice and Her Aura. Clothes Kroos wore when receiving an award at a game expo. She'd just cleared some quests with her friends when she was picked as the lucky player. Wearing the dev-provided costume, she smiled widely at the camera.",
 "dialog": "Achievement Star Collection/The Apprentice and Her Aura. Clothes Kroos wore when receiving an award at a game expo. She'd just cleared some quests with her friends when she was picked as the lucky player. Wearing the dev-provided costume, she smiled widely at the camera.",
 "usage": "One of Kroos the Keen Glint's stage outfits.",
 "description": "After they started playing 'Destiny Quest', Kroos set up an adventurer's guild with her friends called 'Here We Are' and started planning big plans for some large-scale hunting quests. However, looking at guides wasn't a part of those plans.",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 372,
 "displayTagId": null,

 "skinGroupSortIndex": 180,
 "content": "Achievement Star Collection/The Zoophilist and Her Mollusca. At the game expo, Vanilla dressed up as her 'Destiny Quest' character. The beast fight demo will be broadcast live, and the slugs in her pet cage are ready for their debut.",
 "dialog": "Achievement Star Collection/The Zoophilist and Her Mollusca. At the game expo, Vanilla dressed up as her 'Destiny Quest' character. The beast fight demo will be broadcast live, and the slugs in her pet cage are ready for their debut.",
 "usage": "One of Vanilla's stage outfits.",

 "skinGroupName": "Achievement Star/V",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 181,
 "content": "Achievement Star Collection/To Evoke the Anima. Sesa loves games, especially sandbox survival ones with plenty of computer-wrecking bugs. Still, with the 'Garb of the Soulseer', he can overcome any issue, somehow.",
 "dialog": "Achievement Star Collection/To Evoke the Anima. Sesa loves games, especially sandbox survival ones with plenty of computer-wrecking bugs. Still, with the 'Garb of the Soulseer', he can overcome any issue, somehow.",
 "usage": "One of Sesa's stage outfits.",
 "description": "'You've got skills!'\\n'All that exists has a soul. To approach true greatness, the first step is to sense the—Hey! Where're you going?'\\n'Oh, uh, there's a sale going on over there!'",

 "skinGroupName": "Achievement Star/VI",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 182,
 "content": "Achievement Star Collection/A Player Forever. Outfit Mizuki wears when he plays games in Higashi. A perfect fusion of stylish street fashion and retro game elements, letting Mizuki show off his gamer style at max settings.",
 "dialog": "Achievement Star Collection/A Player Forever. Outfit Mizuki wears when he plays games in Higashi. A perfect fusion of stylish street fashion and retro game elements, letting Mizuki show off his gamer style at max settings.",
 "usage": "One of Mizuki's role-playing outfits.",
 "description": "Like many other children, the first time Mizuki found a game he liked, his childhood was only just beginning. It was a naive wish, but he too once hoped these simple joys would never end.",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",

 "skinGroupId": "2023#ncg",
 "skinGroupName": "Chinese National Geography",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 166,
 "content": "Brand Collaborative Series/Towering is Cliff of Nostalgia. Stylish and classic. The wind brushes the cliffs for a thousand years, a thousand li, brushing against the wanderer's robes, brushing into dream.",
 "dialog": "Brand Collaborative Series/Towering is Cliff of Nostalgia. Stylish and classic. The wind brushes the cliffs for a thousand years, a thousand li, brushing against the wanderer's robes, brushing into dream.",
 "usage": "Outfit worn by Ling for long trips.",
 "description": "'How many starry nights must the long wind blow, and how many springs and autumns must the snowmelt wash, before the wonders of blooming gravel are revealed?'",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 376,
 "displayTagId": "From collabs",

 "onYear": 4,

 "skinGroupName": "Chinese National Geography",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 166,
 "content": "Brand Collaborative Series/Wine-flushed is Woods of Rime. Wind-proof and wear-resistant with a clean, slim fit that's easy to move in. Inspired by the northwest poplar forests.",
 "dialog": "Brand Collaborative Series/Wine-flushed is Woods of Rime. Wind-proof and wear-resistant with a clean, slim fit that's easy to move in. Inspired by the northwest poplar forests.",
 "usage": "Outfit worn by Qiubai for long trips.",
 "description": "How long can an old tree stand in the wind and sand? How far can one little boat go? Put your sword away in your rucksack along with the autumn sights.",

 "content": "Brand Collaborative Series/Rainforest, Me, Rainbow. The waterproof, breathable fabric comes in handy for rainforest work. Lightweight, wear-resistant, and protects from the sun. Tail attachment optional.",
 "dialog": "Brand Collaborative Series/Rainforest, Me, Rainbow. The waterproof, breathable fabric comes in handy for rainforest work. Lightweight, wear-resistant, and protects from the sun. Tail attachment optional.",
 "usage": "Outfit worn by Franka for long trips.",
 "description": "Swing once, send five fowlbeasts scampering. Swing twice, make a blue fowl land on the fingertip. Swing three times, make the teacher's pet hysterical again.",

 "skinGroupId": "2023#ncdeer",
 "skinGroupName": "Nine-Colored Deer",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 167,
 "content": "'Nine-Colored Deer' Collaborative Series/A Silvern Caress On the Flow of Time. Crossing the golden sands yet leaving nary a trace, time passes quietly along with the moon's shadow. Nine-Colored Deer meticulously counts the tracks left behind by the passing years, and thus the full moon pauses, seeking one to converse with.",
 "dialog": "'Nine-Colored Deer' Collaborative Series/A Silvern Caress On the Flow of Time. Crossing the golden sands yet leaving nary a trace, time passes quietly along with the moon's shadow. Nine-Colored Deer meticulously counts the tracks left behind by the passing years, and thus the full moon pauses, seeking one to converse with.",
 "usage": "One of Nine-Colored Deer's casual outfits.",
 "description": "'Neither the flowing sands nor moonlight speak. As for the magnificence and treasures of the past millennia, shall I recount their stories for you?'",
 "obtainApproach": "Event Reward",
 "sortId": 379,
 "displayTagId": "From collabs",
 "getTime": 1710759600,
 "onYear": 4,

 }
 },

 "content": "0011 Yun Series/Clouds Float Like Ideas of Art. Presented by the finest Yanese artisans, combining classic style with trendy spirit.",
 "dialog": "0011 Yun Series/Clouds Float Like Ideas of Art. Presented by the finest Yanese artisans, combining classic style with trendy spirit.",

 "skinGroupName": "0011/Yun/III",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 85,
 "content": "0011 Yun Series/Fragrant Pace. A jacket and skirt woven by Dahuang's weavers for the festivities, gifted to Grain Buds to wear as she wanders the fields. Around her, the wonders of nature. By her side, fine friends to be sure.",
 "dialog": "0011 Yun Series/Fragrant Pace. A jacket and skirt woven by Dahuang's weavers for the festivities, gifted to Grain Buds to wear as she wanders the fields. Around her, the wonders of nature. By her side, fine friends to be sure.",
 "usage": "One of Grain Buds's casual outfits.",
 "description": "Fragrant dumplings of jade, lightly wound in brightest thread. Mount and stream bright and green, around orchids do we tread.",

 "content": "0011 Yun Series New Arrivals/Among the Clouds. Garments crafted by Baizao's master tailors, embodying Yan's charms as envisioned by the wearer. Ptilopsis lightly plucks the strings, and heaven and earth resound with a crisp melody.",
 "dialog": "0011 Yun Series New Arrivals/Among the Clouds. Garments crafted by Baizao's master tailors, embodying Yan's charms as envisioned by the wearer. Ptilopsis lightly plucks the strings, and heaven and earth resound with a crisp melody.",
 "usage": "One of Ptilopsis's casual outfits.",
 "description": "Crescents of jade shine upon the peaks, as white owls soar amidst the pale clouds.",

 "skinGroupId": "2024#yun#4",
 "skinGroupName": "0011/Yun/V",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 87,
 "content": "0011 Yun Series New Arrivals/Moon under the Pines. Classic Yanese clothes, mixing tradition with modern craftsmanship. Wind Chimes leans against a tree, watching the moonlight shine in the water, her skirt like a shimmering ripple. What will you dream of tonight?",
 "dialog": "0011 Yun Series New Arrivals/Moon under the Pines. Classic Yanese clothes, mixing tradition with modern craftsmanship. Wind Chimes leans against a tree, watching the moonlight shine in the water, her skirt like a shimmering ripple. What will you dream of tonight?",
 "usage": "One of Wind Chimes's casual outfits.",
 "description": "With a letter home, the bell's toll resounds; Across a thousand li, two moons share the same sky.",

 "skinGroupSortIndex": 88,
 "content": "0011 Yun Series/Whispered Longing. Clothes Lutonada wore while taking a spring walk through Yan. An organic mixture of traditional and modern elements form a refreshing, graceful style that does not sacrifice charm. All sorts of accessories add to the cuteness.",
 "dialog": "0011 Yun Series/Whispered Longing. Clothes Lutonada wore while taking a spring walk through Yan. An organic mixture of traditional and modern elements form a refreshing, graceful style that does not sacrifice charm. All sorts of accessories add to the cuteness.",
 "usage": "One of Lutonada's casual outfits.",
 "description": "Dressed in beautiful clothes, and flying a kite during a beautiful spring day. Now, these last wishes were complete. Lutonada wants to hop down from the wall, but she didn't expect a fowlbeast to nip at her bracelet. She hesitates for a moment, before deciding to stay a little longer.",

 "skinGroupName": "Witch Feast/IV",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 118,
 "content": "Witch Feast Role-Playing Script 'Dominions & Dogma' Custom Line/Hand of Destiny. This player shall be the will of the realm behind the story. She is neither a wicked god, nor a righteous spirit. All she does is let the players roll the dice.",
 "dialog": "Witch Feast Role-Playing Script 'Dominions & Dogma' Custom Line/Hand of Destiny. This player shall be the will of the realm behind the story. She is neither a wicked god, nor a righteous spirit. All she does is let the players roll the dice.",
 "usage": "One of Dorothy's stage outfits.",
 "description": "This is not the first time Dorothy has taken on the role of the lord of the realm. To weave a fantasy, to direct an adventure, to achieve everyone else's hopes and dreams... She has always been like this.",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 386,
 "displayTagId": null,
 "getTime": 1713268800,
 "onYear": 4,
 "onPeriod": 6
 }
 },

 "skinGroupId": "2023#witch",
 "skinGroupName": "Witch Feast/IV",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 118,
 "content": "Witch Feast Role-Playing Script 'Dominions & Dogma' Custom Line/Divine Oath. This player shall be the apostolic knight who takes charge in times of crisis. She is the crimson fury spilling forth from the Holy Spirit's palm, bearing the eternal burden of seeking the land of salvation.",
 "dialog": "Witch Feast Role-Playing Script 'Dominions & Dogma' Custom Line/Divine Oath. This player shall be the apostolic knight who takes charge in times of crisis. She is the crimson fury spilling forth from the Holy Spirit's palm, bearing the eternal burden of seeking the land of salvation.",
 "usage": "One of Fiammetta's stage outfits.",
 "description": "'Stop passing around my character card! I mean it! Divine Oath and Crimson Fury are just made up for the game, not my new codenames!'",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",

 "skinGroupName": "Witch Feast/IV",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 118,
 "content": "Witch Feast Role-Playing Script 'Dominions & Dogma' Custom Line/The Bard's Tale. This player shall be the one singing ballads for the heroes of old, livening up the tavern with her ditties. Come, listen close, who stole the melody that wends through the shadow-flickering breeze?",
 "dialog": "Witch Feast Role-Playing Script 'Dominions & Dogma' Custom Line/The Bard's Tale. This player shall be the one singing ballads for the heroes of old, livening up the tavern with her ditties. Come, listen close, who stole the melody that wends through the shadow-flickering breeze?",
 "usage": "One of Quercus's stage outfits.",
 "description": "There are many who believe themselves dashing and humorous, more than enough to take on the role of a wandering bard, but Quercus's improvised performance is not something just anyone can learn.",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 388,

 }

 "skinGroupSortIndex": 118,
 "content": "Witch Feast Role-Playing Script 'Dominions & Dogma' Custom Line/Priory of Abyss. This player shall be the sister in black, who has saved countless adventurers' lives. The people never ask who forgets the traumas of their mundane lives for them.",
 "dialog": "Witch Feast Role-Playing Script 'Dominions & Dogma' Custom Line/Priory of Abyss. This player shall be the sister in black, who has saved countless adventurers' lives. The people never ask who forgets the traumas of their mundane lives for them.",
 "usage": "One of Whisperain's stage outfits.",
 "description": "Everyone unanimously agreed that Whisperain's character card was scarily well put together, and she herself looks shockingly fitting... Is this really her first time playing this game?",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",

 "skinGroupName": "Witch Feast/V",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 119,
 "content": "Witch Feast Role-Playing Script 'Grimoire of Dark Law' Custom Line/The Shadow of the Dark Moon. She plays the role of the witch guarding the grimoire. The tome is of no use to her. Instead, it is her sword that renders her unstoppable: 'Come, try to defeat me.'",
 "dialog": "Witch Feast Role-Playing Script 'Grimoire of Dark Law' Custom Line/The Shadow of the Dark Moon. She plays the role of the witch guarding the grimoire. The tome is of no use to her. Instead, it is her sword that renders her unstoppable: 'Come, try to defeat me.'",
 "usage": "One of Degenbrecher's stage outfits.",
 "description": "It's rare to see Degenbrecher with such a furrowed brow and intense concentration on her face. After a long while, she finally finds the perfect angle, navigating the witch hat past her horns so it can sit atop her head. She breathes a sigh of relief.",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 390,
 "displayTagId": null,
 "getTime": 1744113600,
 "onYear": 5,
 "onPeriod": 5
 }
 },

 "skinGroupName": "Witch Feast/V",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 119,
 "content": "Witch Feast Role-Playing Script 'Grimoire of Dark Law' Custom Line/Explosive Blue Flame. She plays the role of the hero seeking the grimoire said to have been born amidst the Everlasting Flame. Whichever brave soul claims it can break through all rules and bindings.",
 "dialog": "Witch Feast Role-Playing Script 'Grimoire of Dark Law' Custom Line/Explosive Blue Flame. She plays the role of the hero seeking the grimoire said to have been born amidst the Everlasting Flame. Whichever brave soul claims it can break through all rules and bindings.",
 "usage": "One of Blaze's stage outfits.",
 "description": "Some have noticed a set of suspicious inky footprints on Rhodes Island. They go from the rest area to the control center, leading the curious to see Blaze dragging Amiya along on her pawprint seal playtime.",

 "skinGroupName": "Witch Feast/V",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 119,
 "content": "Witch Feast Role-Playing Script 'Grimoire of Dark Law' Custom Line/Starry Night Sky. He plays the role of the guide showing the hero the way. The Golden Movement has long since faded, but the stars he shoots will forever point true north.",
 "dialog": "Witch Feast Role-Playing Script 'Grimoire of Dark Law' Custom Line/Starry Night Sky. He plays the role of the guide showing the hero the way. The Golden Movement has long since faded, but the stars he shoots will forever point true north.",
 "usage": "One of Bassline's stage outfits.",
 "description": "After the transfiguration of his tuba, Bassline lets out a rare smile of pure joy as he flies through the air with everyone's help. With a wave of his wand, stars appear in the sky.",

 "skinGroupSortIndex": 119,
 "content": "Witch Feast Role-Playing Script 'Grimoire of Dark Law' Custom Line/Witch's Swing. She plays the role of the young witch brought by her dark mistress to gain some experience! Who says a witch's swing has to be a broom? A chainsaw works too!",
 "dialog": "Witch Feast Role-Playing Script 'Grimoire of Dark Law' Custom Line/Witch's Swing. She plays the role of the young witch brought by her dark mistress to gain some experience! Who says a witch's swing has to be a broom? A chainsaw works too!",
 "usage": "One of Popukar's stage outfits.",
 "description": "Wait! Someone stop her! Why's she running around on her chainsaw like it's a broom?! The training room floor can't take any more!",

 "content": "Iteration Provident Series/Wingbreaker. Texas the Omertosa's iteration from decision point F/3019226. The hunter shot down the great demon Vermithrax, but was betrayed by the Lone Wolf Emperor and banished to the barrens.",
 "dialog": "Iteration Provident Series/Wingbreaker. Texas the Omertosa's iteration from decision point F/3019226. The hunter shot down the great demon Vermithrax, but was betrayed by the Lone Wolf Emperor and banished to the barrens.",
 "usage": "One of Texas the Omertosa's iteration points.",

 "skinGroupName": "Iteration Provident/II",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 184,
 "content": "Iteration Provident/Nocturne of Elysia. Blue Poison's iteration from decision point F/3019226. In the land of Elysia, she is the only fairy who is willing to offer a song to the toxic trees.",
 "dialog": "Iteration Provident/Nocturne of Elysia. Blue Poison's iteration from decision point F/3019226. In the land of Elysia, she is the only fairy who is willing to offer a song to the toxic trees.",
 "usage": "One of Blue Poison's iteration points.",

 "designerList": null,
 "skinGroupId": "2025#iteration",
 "skinGroupName": "Iteration Provident/III",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 185,
 "content": "Iteration Provident/Roar Against the Wilds. Młynar's iteration from decision point F/3019226. The Black Riders have finally arrived at the Forgotten Plains, but the Hermit Knight chooses not to leave. Instead, he bars the way, alone.",
 "dialog": "Iteration Provident/Roar Against the Wilds. Młynar's iteration from decision point F/3019226. The Black Riders have finally arrived at the Forgotten Plains, but the Hermit Knight chooses not to leave. Instead, he bars the way, alone.",
 "usage": "One of Młynar's iteration points.",
 "description": "'If you wish to go, they cannot stop you, but you wouldn't be able to live with yourself, would you? You cannot sit idly by while darkness becomes the master of all. So go, show them how a spear forged of light shall never break.'",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 397,
 "displayTagId": null,
 "getTime": 1760443200,
 "onYear": 5,
 "onPeriod": 17
 }
 },

 "Cenm0"\
 \],
 "designerList": null,
 "skinGroupId": "2025#iteration#2",
 "skinGroupName": "Iteration Provident/IV",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 186,
 "content": "Iteration Provident/Phototaxis. Ascalon's iteration from decision point F/3019226. She bids it stay for the sake of the lives of countless unbelievers, but the Seventh Sun is still determined to fall.",
 "dialog": "Iteration Provident/Phototaxis. Ascalon's iteration from decision point F/3019226. She bids it stay for the sake of the lives of countless unbelievers, but the Seventh Sun is still determined to fall.",
 "usage": "One of Ascalon's iteration points.",
 "description": "'I once danced, chasing the flame, but they feared me, and ultimately abandoned me. They have forgotten what sort of power hides in the dark. Come with me. If this thousand years without night has an end, I will cut down each and every sun myself.'",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 398,
 "displayTagId": null,
 "getTime": 1763046000,
 "onYear": 5,
 "onPeriod": 19
 }
 },

 "skinGroupName": "Unveiling of Devotion/I",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 187,
 "content": "Unveiling of Devotion Series New Arrivals/Decoration. A cute dress Harmonie rarely wears. With its adjustable fit and flexible materials, it can accentuate the body's natural curves better than any other. The accessories are all from her beloved private collection.",
 "dialog": "Unveiling of Devotion Series New Arrivals/Decoration. A cute dress Harmonie rarely wears. With its adjustable fit and flexible materials, it can accentuate the body's natural curves better than any other. The accessories are all from her beloved private collection.",
 "usage": "One of Harmonie's casual outfits.",
 "description": "On special occasions, Harmonie will redecorate her room, paying meticulous attention to every detail, all for the sake of appeasing her long-lost maiden's heart.",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 399,
 "displayTagId": null,
 "getTime": 1723287600,
 "onYear": 4,
 "onPeriod": 11
 }
 },

 "skinGroupId": "2024#unveiling",
 "skinGroupName": "Unveiling of Devotion/I",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 187,
 "content": "Unveiling of Devotion Series New Arrivals/Dangerous Invitation. A graceful custom-made suit just for Arene. The stiff material is painstakingly cut to fit his youthful figure. He also personally selected the accompanying perfume.",
 "dialog": "Unveiling of Devotion Series New Arrivals/Dangerous Invitation. A graceful custom-made suit just for Arene. The stiff material is painstakingly cut to fit his youthful figure. He also personally selected the accompanying perfume.",
 "usage": "One of Arene's casual outfits.",
 "description": "The film has ended, and the night has just begun. The lingering fragrance on his fingertips discloses a most dangerous signal, but it is clear that he has left no room to refuse.",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 400,
 "displayTagId": null,
 "getTime": 1723287600,
 "onYear": 4,
 "onPeriod": 11
 }
 },

 \],
 "designerList": null,
 "skinGroupId": "2025#unveiling",
 "skinGroupName": "Unveiling of Devotion/II",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 188,
 "content": "Unveiling of Devotion Series New Arrivals/The Ferry Girl. Clothes Gloria wears on outings. The pink and white of the dress and the flowers complement each other. This is the ferry to the land of love, and she's waiting for you to board.",
 "dialog": "Unveiling of Devotion Series New Arrivals/The Ferry Girl. Clothes Gloria wears on outings. The pink and white of the dress and the flowers complement each other. This is the ferry to the land of love, and she's waiting for you to board.",
 "usage": "One of Nightmare's casual outfits.",
 "description": "'My dear, how can the land of love be real when these lands are so full of hardship? Love and loss walk hand in hand. Do you understand now? This ferry is the final stop. Alright then, now close your eyes, and sleep tight.'",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 401,
 "displayTagId": null,
 "getTime": 1754586000,
 "onYear": 5,
 "onPeriod": 12
 }
 },

 "skinGroupId": "2025#unveiling",
 "skinGroupName": "Unveiling of Devotion/II",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 188,
 "content": "Unveiling of Devotion Series New Arrivals/Romance Overflow. Elaborate dress Hibiscus wore to promote a sightseeing train. Brilliant purples, beautiful hem, and delicate ornamentation—a perfect union of elegance and romance.",
 "dialog": "Unveiling of Devotion Series New Arrivals/Romance Overflow. Elaborate dress Hibiscus wore to promote a sightseeing train. Brilliant purples, beautiful hem, and delicate ornamentation—a perfect union of elegance and romance.",
 "usage": "One of Hibiscus the Purifier's casual outfits.",
 "description": "It's true that Hibiscus is happy to wear such pretty clothes, but what makes her even happier is being afforded the opportunity as both a Sarkaz and an Infected. Their struggles have meant something, she thinks.",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 402,
 "displayTagId": null,
 "getTime": 1754586000,
 "onYear": 5,
 "onPeriod": 12
 }
 },

 "skinGroupName": "Unveiling of Devotion/III",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 189,
 "content": "Unveiling of Devotion Series New Arrivals/Rose Rider. Outfit Verdant wears when passing along the love of others. A casual and leisurely ensemble. The red jacket and the design on the jeans go well with the festive roses.",
 "dialog": "Unveiling of Devotion Series New Arrivals/Rose Rider. Outfit Verdant wears when passing along the love of others. A casual and leisurely ensemble. The red jacket and the design on the jeans go well with the festive roses.",
 "usage": "One of Verdant's casual outfits.",
 "description": "The fowlbeasts were flocking around the 'Scarecrow', so Verdant decided to rest a little in the plaza, taking in the bright sunshine and petals wafting in the wind. Not a bad combo, he thought.",
 "obtainApproach": "Event Reward",
 "sortId": 403,

 "onYear": 5,

 }

 "skinGroupName": "Misaligned Sightseer/I",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 192,
 "content": "Misaligned Sightseer New Arrivals/Iakhu of Flows. In a naptime dream adorned with gold, the earth swells beneath Liz's feet, supporting a homeland. The sphere of the heavens turns above her head, spilling its golden rays upon her.",
 "dialog": "Misaligned Sightseer New Arrivals/Iakhu of Flows. In a naptime dream adorned with gold, the earth swells beneath Liz's feet, supporting a homeland. The sphere of the heavens turns above her head, spilling its golden rays upon her.",
 "usage": "One of Nightingale's casual outfits.",
 "description": "Bathed in the brilliant flows, Liz sees some beautiful possibilities—but it all comes to an end once she wakes.",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",

 "content": "Misaligned Sightseer New Arrivals/Courtyard of Neka. Out of curiosity, Hoederer knocks open the door to an ancient courtyard. He stands before a tranquil pond, engraving the beauty he stumbled upon into his memory.",
 "dialog": "Misaligned Sightseer New Arrivals/Courtyard of Neka. Out of curiosity, Hoederer knocks open the door to an ancient courtyard. He stands before a tranquil pond, engraving the beauty he stumbled upon into his memory.",

 "skinGroupName": "Misaligned Sightseer/I",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 192,
 "content": "Misaligned Sightseer New Arrivals/Sedjem. Weedy treads the boundary between sand and water, tracing the flow ever deeper. Is what she hears the whispers of the sea of salt, or the greetings of the sea of sand?",
 "dialog": "Misaligned Sightseer New Arrivals/Sedjem. Weedy treads the boundary between sand and water, tracing the flow ever deeper. Is what she hears the whispers of the sea of salt, or the greetings of the sea of sand?",
 "usage": "One of Weedy's casual outfits.",
 "description": "Weedy goes wherever the wind blows. It seems rather clear she's forgotten she's here on holiday.",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 406,

 "skinGroupId": "2024#deliciousInDungeon",
 "skinGroupName": "Delicious in Dungeon",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 193,
 "content": "Brand Collaborative Series/Terra & Traveller. Clothes Marcille wears when telling stories of her adventures aboard Rhodes Island. She acts as she imagines the Lunatic Magician would, summoning several familiars with a wave of her hand. Some of them even look like our operators!",
 "dialog": "Brand Collaborative Series/Terra & Traveller. Clothes Marcille wears when telling stories of her adventures aboard Rhodes Island. She acts as she imagines the Lunatic Magician would, summoning several familiars with a wave of her hand. Some of them even look like our operators!",
 "usage": "One of Marcille's casual outfits.",
 "description": "'Balanced Diet General Laios, Disciplined Lifestyle General Chilchuck, and Moderate Exercise General Senshi! Heed my command—Devour them!'\\nMarcille makes sure to practice her more dramatic lines before every performance.",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 407,
 "displayTagId": "From collabs",
 "getTime": 1741626000,
 "onYear": 5,

 }

 "Cenm0"\

 "skinGroupId": "2024#cfa",
 "skinGroupName": "CROSSOVER",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 194,
 "content": "Collaborative Series/'Ride to Davistown'. Clothes the rookie actress Jessica wore for her audition. Whether pointing a gun at someone else or at herself, she'd immediately tear up. Director Nian was real pleased.",
 "dialog": "Collaborative Series/'Ride to Davistown'. Clothes the rookie actress Jessica wore for her audition. Whether pointing a gun at someone else or at herself, she'd immediately tear up. Director Nian was real pleased.",
 "usage": "One of Jessica the Liberated's costumes.",
 "description": "'Y-You're threatening me because I'm a new actress?' 'Uhh, Laura, your butt won't hurt any longer.' 'We must learn to get along with these Laterans. We don't have a choice—' 'D-Director Nian, how was that?'",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 408,
 "displayTagId": "From collabs",
 "getTime": 1749747600,
 "onYear": 5,
 "onPeriod": 9
 }
 },

 "skinGroupId": "2024#cfa",
 "skinGroupName": "CROSSOVER",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 194,
 "content": "Collaborative Series/Thunderbolt Director. Clothes the prodigy director Nian wears on the job. Having analyzed countless classics, she channels the inspiration into her latest blockbuster: Unlimited Showdown in the Siege of Monster Doomsday.",
 "dialog": "Collaborative Series/Thunderbolt Director. Clothes the prodigy director Nian wears on the job. Having analyzed countless classics, she channels the inspiration into her latest blockbuster: Unlimited Showdown in the Siege of Monster Doomsday.",
 "usage": "One of Nian's casual outfits.",
 "description": "Apparently Director Nian had a burst of inspiration. Not only has she come up with over a hundred designs for the doomsday kaiju, she is also filming a police-themed action flick with Chongyue as the lead, and shooting another movie just to help Jessica's self-esteem.",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 409,
 "displayTagId": "From collabs",
 "getTime": 1749747600,
 "onYear": 5,
 "onPeriod": 9
 }
 },

 "designerList": null,
 "skinGroupId": "2024#cfa",
 "skinGroupName": "CROSSOVER",
 "skinGroupSortIndex": 194,
 "content": "Collaborative Series/All-Round Actor. Clothes Chongyue wears when studying past roles. The characters are so different, so how should one breathe life into them? He browses both scripts and tapes, experiencing life after life after life.",
 "dialog": "Collaborative Series/All-Round Actor. Clothes Chongyue wears when studying past roles. The characters are so different, so how should one breathe life into them? He browses both scripts and tapes, experiencing life after life after life.",
 "usage": "One of Chongyue's costumes.",
 "description": "Having suddenly gone from stunt coordinator to leading man, Chongyue admits he's not too sure what to do right now, especially after seeing one younger sister sitting in the director's chair, and another on the set drinking from her flask.",
 "obtainApproach": "Store",
 "sortId": 410,
 "displayTagId": "From collabs",
 "getTime": 1749747600,
 "onYear": 5,
 "onPeriod": 9
 }
 },

 "description": "Through the bloodline, the struggle continues.\\n'Bloodline of Combat' is an experimental personal equipment series developed by Rhodes Island in collaboration with other organizations based upon the actual needs of operators.
